programme.title: Molly of Denali: Mollyball/ Visit Qyah
programme.desc: After wet cement ruins Molly and the gang's plans for a basketball rematch, they head over to the Trading Post. While looking through a travel guide of different Alaskan villages, Molly discovers that Qyah isn't included!

programme.title: To Be Announced
programme.desc: Programming to be announced.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighborhood: Calm at the Clock Factory/ Calm for Storytime
programme.desc: Prince Wednesday learns that there are times to be calm and times to be silly.

programme.title: Ready Jet Go!: Mars Rock for Mom/ Sean Has a Cold
programme.desc: Jet wants to do something special for Celery for Mother's Day; A cold prevents Sean from flying kites with the other kids.

programme.title: Sesame Street: Earth Day
programme.desc: Rudy learns to be kind to the earth after he sees what it would be like if everyone acted like him and threw their trash on the street.

programme.title: Pinkalicious & Peterrific: School Rules/Scooterboy
programme.desc: To Pinkalicious, Goldie the unicorn is her best friend - but to Kendra, Goldie doesn't exist! When Kendra accidentally causes Goldie to go missing, she's determined to find her. Pinkalicious brings her pet unicorn to school.

programme.title: The Great British Baking Show: Batter
programme.desc: Join nine bakers for the first-ever batter week. They prepare a British favorite that demands a uniform bake across the batch; a technical challenge that requires a perfect pastry, sweet filling and delicate icing; and a showstopping Spanish classic.

programme.title: Nature: Animals With Cameras
programme.desc: Deep-dive with Chilean devil rays in the Azores, track brown bears’ diets in Turkey and follow dogs protecting flocks of sheep from gray wolves in southern France.

programme.title: Nova: Rise of the Mammals
programme.desc: Sixty-six million years ago, an asteroid wiped out the dinosaurs in a fiery global catastrophe. An amazing new trove of fossils reveals how mammals took over, ultimately evolving into the huge array of species -- including us -- that rule the Earth today.

programme.title: Forces of Nature: Color
programme.desc: Earth is painted in stunning colors. By understanding how these colors are created and the energy they carry, we can learn the secret language of the planet.

programme.title: Dinosaur Train: Classic in the Jurassic: Turtle and Theropod Race/ Hungry, Hungry Carnivores
programme.desc: Different dinosaur teams compete in various contests at the Classic in the Jurassic competition. Buddy, Tiny, Mom, and Laura meet a generous chef and eat some of his famous carrion dishes.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat Knows a Lot About That: Manatees and Mermaids/ The Last Chocolate
programme.desc: Cat and the kids go swimming with manatees and learn about their environment. Visit Princess Lottachocka to learn how to make chocolate.

programme.title: NCIS: Page Not Found
programme.desc: After returning to her job at the Department of Defense, McGee's girlfriend Delilah finds a break in a controversial case, prompting her to turn to the team for help. Meanwhile, McGee talks to DiNozzo about whether he should ask Delilah to move in.

programme.title: NCIS: Alleged
programme.desc: After a navy officer is found dead on a rural road, the team must ascertain if the murder was the result of a bar fight or because he knew too much about an attack on a fellow female officer. Meanwhile, DiNozzo and McGee start a juice cleanse.

programme.title: NCIS: Shooter
programme.desc: When a Marine photographer disappears prior to providing his testimony in an Army court-martial hearing, the NCIS team investigates both the murder he witnessed as well as his current piece on military veterans who are homeless.

programme.title: WWE NXT
programme.desc: A unique acrobatic and theatrically aggressive presentation of wrestling.

programme.title: Movie: American Sniper
programme.desc: With more than 150 confirmed kills to his name Chris Kyle is known to be the most lethal sniper in U.S. military history. His fame spreads behind enemy lines, however, and he finds himself with a target on his own back.

programme.title: Cannonball: The Human Dart
programme.desc: Athletes compete for $10,000 in the wildest and wettest challenges ever created.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A Little Devil Complex
programme.desc: Antonio and his sister Gabriela go to the office of Elliot Gish, the man they believe started the fire that killed Shay. Intelligence puts pressure on Gish to confess. Lindsay approaches Voight about returning to Intelligence.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Erin's Mom
programme.desc: Bunny comes to Lindsay concerned about a suspicious repeat customer at her husband's rental company. This lead brings info into a case which robbery-homicide has been working for months. Voight doesn't trust Bunny's motive for the tip.

programme.title: Dateline: The Day She Disappeared
programme.desc: When a young mother set out for a morning jog and never returned, police found a tiny clue buried in a home computer that could unlock the mystery.

programme.title: Dateline: The Player
programme.desc: The story of a double murder with no witnesses and few clues.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Sin City Blue
programme.desc: Two beautiful women are murdered in a Las Vegas hotel and the team uncovers a strange killer during their investigation. Meanwhile, Langston continues to hunt 'Dr. Jekyll.'

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Mountebank
programme.desc: Sam goes undercover as a day trader after a prominent investment banker with ties to a Russian oligarch is murdered. Also, one of Callen's aliases is the victim of credit card theft and Mosely is concerned it signals something bigger.

programme.title: NCIS: Twilight
programme.desc: The duel continues between Gibbs and his nemesis with fatal results for one NCIS member.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Beef
programme.desc: After a woman is raped and murdered, Benson and Stabler track down her boyfriend, who they learn would not hurt a fly. They soon find out the victim was trying to expose questionable practices in the meat packing industry and may have angered some people.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Behave
programme.desc: A rape victim is brought to the hospital claiming to have been attacked by the same man many times. The detectives learn that the precincts were not testing their rape kits and the investigation leads to Los Angeles.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Merchandise
programme.desc: When a young girl is hit by a car and killed, Dr. Warner rules it a homicide. She found that the girl was being starved and had recently given birth. The detectives follow some leads and learn that the girl was involved in a human trafficking ring.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Branded
programme.desc: Benson and Stabler investigate a brutal attack against a father and learn that he had been branded with a coat hanger. Before long, another victim turns up who is suffering from the same injury.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Trophy
programme.desc: After the body of a young woman turns up in a laundromat, Detectives learn she was part of an environmental group called CLEAN. Soon, a suspect is tracked down, but it puts the detectives in the line of fire and exposes a bigger mystery.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Pop
programme.desc: A young boy is found dead on a park carousel after being dropped off by his uncle. When detectives learn he was beaten to death, they suspect it may be the school bully, but the investigation leads them to a gambling ring.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Mask
programme.desc: Debbie Shields arrives home to find her partner, Ann Jackson, being raped by an intruder wearing a mask. Debbie must then inform Captain Jackson, Ann's father, about his daughter's critical condition.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Dirty

programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel are certain that the new tenants are planning to blow up the building.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Vacation
programme.desc: The girls' dream vacation in the Caribbean turns out to be far from what was advertised in the brochure. While the girls are away, Sophia romances the gardener.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Joust Between Friends
programme.desc: Laid off from work, Dorothy searches for part-time work which leads to Blanche getting her a job at the museum. Then fur flies when Dorothy is handed the job of organizing a banquet, the duty Blanche was hoping for.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Love, Rose
programme.desc: Rose places an ad in the personals column and she is let down when she doesn't hear an immediate response. This leads Blanche and Dorothy to begin responding under the name Isaac Newton.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: 'Twas the Nightmare Before Christmas
programme.desc: The girls each plan to spend Christmas with their families but a series of strange occurrences lead them to spend Christmas together in Miami.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Sisters
programme.desc: As a birthday present for Sophia, Dorothy brings Sophia's sister over from Sicily.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Stan Who Came to Dinner
programme.desc: Dorothy feels sympathy for Stan when he tells her he's going to have open heart surgery. However that sympathy fades when she learns of his many infidelities while they were married.

programme.title: Movie: Love on the Menu
programme.desc: A chef makes a deal with a frozen food executive in order to save his restaurant.

programme.title: Movie: The Sweeter Side of Life
programme.desc: A woman is left penniless after her divorce, and though she wants nothing more than to return to her high-class life, spending time with her father in her hometown causes her to see things differently.

programme.title: Movie: Just Add Romance
programme.desc: Two talented chefs, with very different cooking styles, are forced to work together on a cable cooking show. With a huge prize hanging in the balance, these two will have to sort out their chemistry both on screen, and off.

programme.title: Movie: Moonlight in Vermont
programme.desc: When Fiona gets dumped she heads for a week in Vermont at her Dad's country Inn. There she runs into her ex with his new girlfriend. She strikes a deal with the Inn's chef, Derek, to be her 'boyfriend' for the week.

programme.title: South Park: Safe Space
programme.desc: Cartman is the latest victim of body shaming.

programme.title: South Park: I Should Have Never Gone Ziplining
programme.desc: The boys' ziplining adventure becomes a terrifying test of survival.

programme.title: South Park: The Coon
programme.desc: 'The Coon' rises from the trash and takes his place as a lone vigilante who wipes out crime in the town of South Park. When another superhero encroaches on his territory, The Coon seeks out some unlikely allies.

programme.title: South Park: A Ladder to Heaven
programme.desc: Kenny died with the winning ticket to a prize of endless candy in his pocket. The boys decide to build a ladder to Heaven where they expect to find him and get the ticket back. The Feds think Saddam may be hiding weapons in Heaven and plan to bomb it.

programme.title: South Park: Crippled Summer
programme.desc: Jimmy and Timmy head off to summer camp with all their handi-capable friends. When one of the camp counsellors, Towelie, falls off the wagon, the boys stage an intervention.

programme.title: South Park: Towelie
programme.desc: When the government steals their new Gamesphere, the boys will stop at nothing to get it back. There is also a new dysfunctional character in South Park who tries to recruit the boys to his cause.

programme.title: South Park: Timmy! 2000
programme.desc: When Timmy is diagnosed with Attention Deficit Disorder, it triggers a wave of prescription drug abuse at South Park Elementary. With all the spare time he has now, Timmy joins a rock band as the lead singer.

programme.title: South Park: Funnybot
programme.desc: Jimmy hosts the Special Ed Department's First Annual Comedy Awards.

programme.title: South Park: Tegridy Farms
programme.desc: Butters is selling vape pens and all kinds of fruity-flavored vape accessories at school. Randy decides he should move the family to the country and take up farming.

programme.title: South Park: Handicar
programme.desc: Timmy's successful new car service makes him a lot of enemies.

programme.title: South Park: Cripple Fight
programme.desc: Big Gay Al returns to South Park as the new scout leader. When he is fired for being gay, the boys rally to his defence with the help of the new 'handi-capable' kid, Jimmy.

programme.title: Corporate: The Importance of Talking S**t
programme.desc: As the employees of Hampton DeVille gossip and take passive-aggressive approaches to workplace conflicts, they create unlikely bonds and new adversaries.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: July 22, 2020
programme.desc: As the coronavirus keeps millions confined to their homes, Trevor reports on the pandemic from the comfort of his couch, and The World's Fakest News Team weighs in on the crisis from a safe social distance.

programme.title: Corporate: The Importance of Talking S**t
programme.desc: As the employees of Hampton DeVille gossip and take passive-aggressive approaches to workplace conflicts, they create unlikely bonds and new adversaries.

programme.title: South Park: Guitar Queer-O
programme.desc: Stan and Kyle become obsessed with Guitar Hero to the point where they're breaking high score records, and it doesn't take long for Stan to realize that he could go even further with a different partner.

programme.title: South Park: Whale Whores
programme.desc: Stan takes action to stop the Japanese from killing the world's whales and dolphins.

programme.title: South Park: Grounded Vindaloop
programme.desc: Butters is convinced he's living in a virtual reality.

programme.title: South Park: Sons a Witches
programme.desc: At the annual Halloween get together, a witch casts a spell that terrorizes everyone in South Park.

programme.title: South Park: Doubling Down
programme.desc: Kyle is playing with fire when he gets in the middle of Cartman and Heidi's relationship.

programme.title: South Park: T.M.I.
programme.desc: Cartman throws a fit when the boys' penis sizes are posted on the school bulletin board, and is sent to anger management therapy.

programme.title: South Park: Tsst!
programme.desc: Cartman's mom gets help from an expert when she realizes she cannot control her son anymore. The expert, known as 'The Dog Whisperer', may have what it takes but Eric Cartman's not going down without a fight.

programme.title: South Park: Faith Hilling
programme.desc: The kids are in danger when new trends start to evolve and shift at a rapid pace.

programme.title: South Park: Fun With Veal
programme.desc: Stan is appalled when he realizes the veal he's been eating is, in fact, the meat from little baby calves. He goes to great lengths to rescue calves from the slaughterhouse, and a standoff with the Park County Police Department ensues.

programme.title: South Park: Cat Orgy
programme.desc: While all the adults are gathering at Mr. Mackey's house to watch a meteor shower Shelly Marsh is left baby-sit Cartman. They square off when she invites her much older boyfriend over.

programme.title: The Balancing Act: Behind the Mystery: NoH & More
programme.desc: Learning more about Neurogenic orthostatic hypotension, meet Mystic Michaela, and later, how a proper pillow can give you a good night's rest.

programme.title: The Closer: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: Deputy Chief Johnson's investigation into a famous Hollywood divorce attorney found floating in his swimming pool is under heavy scrutiny. Meanwhile, Fritz and Brenda are trying to consolidate their bills, but Brenda discovers a secret.

programme.title: The Closer: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: Under intense pressure, Brenda has forty-eight hours to break a new witness' alibi and get her case back on track. Meanwhile, Brenda's relationship with Fritz is in danger as secrets loom.

programme.title: The Closer: Next of Kin
programme.desc: Brenda finds herself transporting a robbery suspect in a recreational vehicle driven by her parents.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Cops vs. Zombies
programme.desc: The team works on behalf of the dead, and the undead, after a murder occurs at a zombie convention. Angela decides to pursue her GED after revealing that she never graduated from high school.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Post Mortem
programme.desc: When a mailman is killed, the team must work with a brash, eccentric Postal Inspector, who believes the mailman's murder is part of a larger conspiracy. Maura continues to struggle with the ramifications of her injury.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Shadow of Doubt
programme.desc: When a wealthy woman is found dead at the bottom of her stairs, we realize that this was no ordinary slip-and-fall accident. The team is pressed into a game of cat and mouse with a clever killer determined to get away with the perfect crime.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Allemon and Johnson
programme.desc: Meet Ohio bodybuilder Melissa Johnson, a trophy-winning professional who encourages competition and demands perfection from her family. Melissa swaps places with a Diane, who's raising a family of little people and refuses to take life too seriously.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Koopman and Early
programme.desc: An aspiring model from New York and her carefree family swap lives with a traditional grandmother, her farm-living family and their one-ton performing buffalo named Clyde.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Starling/ Sweany-Ernst
programme.desc: A mom who plans her whole family's lives around her 13-year-old son's motocross obsession swaps lives with a mom who worships Mother Earth and talks to fairies.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Killing Spree
programme.desc: A string of murders targeting a pizza chain and its employees leads to a nationwide manhunt for a killer hell-bent on revenge.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Overtime Overkill
programme.desc: Catherine Marlow's ambition to travel the world meant working the occasional weekend, but her dedication is her downfall when she's killed in the office on her day off.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hand Delivered
programme.desc: An anonymous 'tip' referring to unpublicized aspects of an unsolved case, leads police on a hunt for a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death Play
programme.desc: Marie Robard's character in her high school's play 'Hamlet' hinted at her own inner turmoil.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Print Conviction
programme.desc: A woman leaves a bar with a stranger only to have her body discovered the next morning.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Vow of Silence
programme.desc: When a man's friends report his mail-order bride missing, police soon orient their investigation around the husband. While following up on some leads, they dig up some evidence tying him to deaths of two other wives.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dessert Served Cold
programme.desc: When a Massachusetts man dropped dead of an apparent heart attack, no one thought foul play was a possibility until police looked into his girlfriend’s odd behavior in the days before his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Music Case
programme.desc: The sense of security in Waseca, Minnesota shatters when 12-year-old Cally Jo Larson is found dead in her home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grounds for Indictment
programme.desc: When police have trouble pinning a suspect to the scene of the crime in a deadly drive-by-shooting, even after investigating cell phone calls and shell casings, they turn to the dirt in the perpetrator's tires.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Duelling Confessions
programme.desc: When a teenage girl is found dead on the side of the road her boyfriend becomes the prime suspect. He eventually confessed to her murder, but so did another man. It would take forty years, an author and an expert in pedestrian accidents to find the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cloak of Deceit
programme.desc: Forensic scientists study video surveillance of a trio of men who have been robbing banks for 7 years. They are eventually caught because of the forensic team's expert skill.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Medicine
programme.desc: A woman becomes critically ill, leaving her unable to walk. As her symptoms worsen, she gets a bone marrow test. The results reveal arsenic. Investigators now have to determine if she was poisoned by water contamination, or something far more sinister.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Co-Ed Killer: The Murder Capital Of The World (Part 1)
programme.desc: A frantic public, desperate for answers, live in terror, waiting for the man they dubbed 'The Co-Ed Killer' to strike again. But no one could have expected that the person responsible, a local man, Edmund Kemper, was living among them.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Co-Ed Killer: Thinking Murder All Day Long (Part 2)
programme.desc: In April 1973, 24-year-old Edmund Kemper had murdered six coeds in and around the city of Santa Cruz, California, shaking the community to its core.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Zodiac
programme.desc: A serial killer that admires the infamous Zodiac Killer prowls New York City's streets for six years, trying to kill one person for every zodiac sign. Police use a variety of forensic tools to arrest the culprit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Letter Perfect
programme.desc: A healthy young man dies mysteriously in his sleep. There are no signs of trauma or injury, but toxicology tests reveal a lethal dose of lidocaine in his blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: True Lies
programme.desc: It took a murder victim's 9 year-old child, notations in a diary, and forensic psychology to determine which forensic evidence was important and which to ignore.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bed of Deceit
programme.desc: When a retired police officer is found shot dead in his bed, investigators suspect suicide. But the evidence, alongside surveillance tape from a nearby bank, seems to indicate it was murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cats, Flies and Snapshots
programme.desc: A 19-year-old Pennsylvania woman disappears on her way to work leaving behind her infant son, a family who loves her, and a job she enjoys. Police investigators view this case as a missing person/ possible homicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naked Justice
programme.desc: The 29-year-old, pregnant wife of a young, successful attorney is found dead in her Michigan home of a gunshot wound to the head. Blood spatter analysis and a painstaking investigation led police to the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hand Delivered
programme.desc: An anonymous 'tip' referring to unpublicized aspects of an unsolved case, leads police on a hunt for a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death Play
programme.desc: Marie Robard's character in her high school's play 'Hamlet' hinted at her own inner turmoil.

programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Chained by a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Prominent realtor Todd Kohlhepp’s double life is exposed when police launch a dramatic rescue – all caught on body camera – of a young woman chained like a dog inside a shipping container on his property.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Crazy, Sexy and Deadly
programme.desc: Shayna Hubers and Ryan Poston seemed like a match made in heaven, until he ends up dead in a pool of blood, shot in the face. Stunning interrogation tapes leave cops in disbelief and lead investigators to a surprising motive.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Slippery Motives
programme.desc: While staying at a hotel in St. Louis, Missouri, a Louisiana woman drowns in a bathtub. Her husband claims it was an accident, but detectives are skeptical as they discover evidence of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Deceit
programme.desc: Women in a small Louisiana city live in fear of a rapist who becomes so experienced he leaves no clues to his identity. But computer technology and behavioral science combine to give police a new forensic tool: geographical profiling.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Alibi
programme.desc: When 17-year-old Crystal Faye Todd was raped and murdered in her small town, one of her male acquaintances’ DNA matched semen at the crime scene. It raised the question, why would he volunteer for a DNA sample?

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Purr-fect Match
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bio-Attack
programme.desc: A religious cult's bizarre plot to overthrow the government using germ warfare.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: A woman is found dead of a gunshot wound and police conclude that she was murdered by her husband. Forensic scientists were able to piece together the clues and determine what really happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherhoods
programme.desc: Police suspect white supremacists when a gay couple is killed in their bed. Shell casings, some chips of paint and shards of glass help link their suspects to a string of hate crimes across the state of California.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair of the Dog
programme.desc: With no forensic evidence found at a murder scene, investigators were baffled. But they suspected that the victim's dog had witnessed the crime.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Captain Morgan's Lost Gold
programme.desc: Josh dives into the Lajas Reef off Panama's coast in search for treasure chests on the sunken flagship of legendary pirate Captain Morgan. His journey takes him to Panama City and he visits the Panama Canal, a modern marvel.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Chasing the Fortune of Sir Francis Drake
programme.desc: Josh Gates searches land and sea for the lost fortune of legendary pirate, Sir Francis Drake. Joining treasure hunters and maritime archaeologists, Josh hunts for a lost cache of Spanish gold and the remains of Drake himself.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Captain Kidd's Treasure
programme.desc: Josh retraces the footsteps of the legendary Captain Kidd in the hopes of finding his buried treasure. From the East Coast to the Caribbean, the search takes him to a real pirate shipwreck and to the island hideout of the notorious buccaneer.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Atlantis of the Andes
programme.desc: Josh dives into a mystery below South America's Lake Titicaca. During the investigation, Josh discovers multiple structures of the ancient Tiwanaku people including ruins hidden in the lake's depths, dubbed 'the Atlantis of the Andes.'

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Search for the Megashark
programme.desc: As he prepares for Shark Week 2020, Josh Gates plunges into the mystery of the megalodon. He travels to Mexico and South Africa to dive into shark-infested waters and search for fossilized megalodon teeth to find out what happened to the Mighty Meg.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Escobar's Treasure Sub
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade reveals details of a high-speed chase between a narco sub and the US Coast Guard. With the help of declassified files and cutting-edge military technology, experts investigate if they've found Pablo Escobar's lost treasure.

programme.title: River Monsters: Coral Reef Killer
programme.desc: When a snorkeler is impaled and killed by an unseen underwater assailant in the waters surrounding the tropical island of Sulawesi in Indonesia, Jeremy Wade travels to the remote islands to investigate a spate of similar attacks across the region.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Atlantis of the Andes
programme.desc: Josh dives into a mystery below South America's Lake Titicaca. During the investigation, Josh discovers multiple structures of the ancient Tiwanaku people including ruins hidden in the lake's depths, dubbed 'the Atlantis of the Andes.'

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Search for the Megashark
programme.desc: As he prepares for Shark Week 2020, Josh Gates plunges into the mystery of the megalodon. He travels to Mexico and South Africa to dive into shark-infested waters and search for fossilized megalodon teeth to find out what happened to the Mighty Meg.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Escobar's Treasure Sub
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade reveals details of a high-speed chase between a narco sub and the US Coast Guard. With the help of declassified files and cutting-edge military technology, experts investigate if they've found Pablo Escobar's lost treasure.

programme.title: River Monsters: Coral Reef Killer
programme.desc: When a snorkeler is impaled and killed by an unseen underwater assailant in the waters surrounding the tropical island of Sulawesi in Indonesia, Jeremy Wade travels to the remote islands to investigate a spate of similar attacks across the region.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: The Loch Ness Conspiracy
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade chases new leads in pursuit of the Loch Ness Monster's hiding place. Using the latest evidence and state-of-the-art science, experts might finally reveal the truth behind this legendary monster.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: NASA's Lost Treasure
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates the whereabouts of a lost relic of the Space Age that tarnished the reputation of NASA's first astronauts; as cutting-edge technology turns up brand-new evidence, experts might finally vindicate this American hero.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Mountain Timber Frame
programme.desc: A man builds an off-grid timber frame cabin on his family's 100-acre property in upstate New York.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Pacific Coast Perch
programme.desc: Pro-builder Mark Smith is building an off-grid modular home stooped high on a cliff off the coast of Vancouver, Canada. The pressure is on as even the smallest mistake can result in the home tumbling 85 feet down into the ocean.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Vermont Stone House
programme.desc: Novice builder Danny Clark attempts to construct a 600-square-foot stone cabin in Vermont's White River Valley. The home is sure to be a true work of art but his inexperience, the harsh winter and the unusual architecture push him to his limits.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Carolina Catamaran
programme.desc: A couple of pro builders construct an upcycled off-grid homestead deep in the sprawling South Carolina islands. Plans for the catamaran-style home include a luxury yacht aesthetic, but the couple must build during hurricane season to meet their deadline.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Tiny Forest Cottage
programme.desc: New York newlyweds escape the city to build their first home upstate in a secluded part of the Hudson Valley. Utilizing timber felled from their own property, they plan to craft their own tiny house completely off the grid.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Vail Log Cabin
programme.desc: The Walker family rebuilds their 100 year old mining cabin in the Colorado wilderness. Fortunately, they're a family of engineers who are game for any challenges. The tools used for this project will be as old as the cabin itself!

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Island Getaway
programme.desc: A family attempts to build a 400-square foot cabin situated on a small island in Northern Idaho. Access to the property is limited and rough waters make it difficult to bring materials in. It's a race to the finish as winter hits the island early.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Hawaii Dome House
programme.desc: A mother-and-son team pulls up stakes from the crowded confines of Orange County to build an off-grid family commune outside Keaau, Hawaii. With the help of a skilled aircrete instructor, the duo overcomes a learning curve to make their dreams come true.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Homestead of Horrors
programme.desc: A nightmare in North Carolina. A couple that is terrified to hunt and a ramshackle home with exposed wires in the shower and chickens in the living room. The Raneys have never seen a homestead like this.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Grizzly Bait
programme.desc: Arctic temperatures and a hungry grizzly wreak havoc on a struggling homestead. The Raneys leap to action with huge builds including a blacksmith shop, but tragedy strikes.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: The Bears and the Bees
programme.desc: The Raney family arrives at a homestead with a bee-obsessed owner unintentionally attracting bears with his hives. Marty bush-engineers a windmill to pump water to a new bathhouse, but the dangerous North Carolina wind threatens progress.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Brianne's Story
programme.desc: At over 700 pounds, Brianne undertakes a weight-loss journey to save her own life and faces an unexpected challenge to her fragile progress when her husband suffers a heart attack on a birthday she will never forget.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Benji and David's Story

programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put the nasty in namaste when they lead guided meditations. Tonight's big loser gets boxed in with a 24-hour punishment.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Wild Call
programme.desc: When a 12-foot gator manages to trap itself in wires, the wardens are determined to set it free. Warden Boone responds to a domestic dispute call, and a grey fox is found trapped in a residential area. Meanwhile, a darted goose chase ensues.

programme.title: Lone Star Law
programme.desc: Texas game wardens protect the natural resources of their vast state while fighting crime.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Above and Beyond
programme.desc: For a game warden, there's no such thing as being off the clock. Wardens McBrine and Carter embark on a multi-day hunt for a wanted man. Warden Herring investigates a mysterious shack on city property. Warden McKenney works to remove a deadly hazard.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Uncuffed: In the Raging Storm

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Moving Target

programme.desc: The wardens are deep into deer season, investigating a suspected poacher and a felon who shouldn't be using a firearm to hunt. An alligator and her hatchlings must be captured and relocated from a school.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Rustic English Re-tree-t

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Bon-Appé-Treehouse

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Surprise Makeover Edition

programme.desc: The brutal murder of an elderly landlady offers no forensic answers. Detectives piece together security footage, and a motive to find their killer.

programme.title: The Stalking of Katie Key
programme.desc: When Katie Key's ex-boyfriend can't take no for an answer, stalking escalates into violence and leaves this small Tennessee community in pieces.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Last Shop
programme.desc: On March 29, 2016, music loving Louise Dickey is discovered brutally murdered in a bath of her own blood. With no imaginable motive for the homicide and no witnesses, detectives seek out surveillance cameras to uncover the shocking truth.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Widow on Solway Road
programme.desc: Investigates the murder case against Raynella Leath in the death of her second husband, David Leath.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: Only the Good
programme.desc: In the quiet suburb of Cordova Tennessee, Jimmy McClain is living a good life as a teacher and coach at a local high school. Until an early February morning, police find him assassinated in his home.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: The Unwelcome Wagon
programme.desc: When Staff Sgt. Michael Severance goes AWOL the community of San Angelo rallies around his new bride. But there is something more sinister behind his disappearance, and investigators uncover a saga of treachery and passion as big as the state of Texas.

programme.title: Village of the Damned: The 'Curse' Begins at Christmas
programme.desc: In 1989, in peaceful Dryden, New York, a Christmastime massacre claims an entire family. Just when it seems the horror has passed, terror visits Dryden again. With these events, a so-called "curse" will descend on Dryden for ten years.

programme.title: Village of the Damned: Thirteen Days in Winter
programme.desc: For thirteen days in winter, the Dryden community searches for a little girl missing in the blinding snow. Not even the police suspect the horrible truth. Three years later, the 'curse' of Dryden returns when a love triangle turns to murder.

programme.title: Village of the Damned: Dryden's Dark Soul
programme.desc: As Dryden's dark cloud, two love stories turn to tragedy. In 1993, a woman awakes to see one friend murder another in a fit of jealous rage. Just a year later, Dryden's beloved football coach crosses paths with his daughter's deranged ex-boyfriend.

programme.title: Village of the Damned: The Final Fall
programme.desc: As news of the football coach ripples across town, Dryden prays the worst is over. But in September 1996, a month of terror brings the "curse: to a crescendo. Three tragedies will lead outsiders to call Dryden the 'Village of the Damned.'

programme.title: Village of the Damned: The Final Fall
programme.desc: As news of the football coach ripples across town, Dryden prays the worst is over. But in September 1996, a month of terror brings the "curse: to a crescendo. Three tragedies will lead outsiders to call Dryden the 'Village of the Damned.'

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Gypsy Blanchard
programme.desc: A mother is found dead and her disabled daughter missing. As police investigate, they discover many secrets, lies, and betrayals.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Bad Blood
programme.desc: There's no body. No murder weapon. But police believe a beloved wife and mother is dead and that the killer is her husband, who insists he's innocent. Prosecutors take him to court four times, trying to unravel the truth about a haunting disappearance.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Her Last Chance
programme.desc: After two trials, Kimberly Long was convicted of brutally murdering her boyfriend, Ozzy Conde, has spent seven years in prison, and, with the help of The California Innocence Project, she now has a new shot at justice.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Good Fences Make Dead Neighbors
programme.desc: Instead of a brand new start, a man's move to Canyon Country, California, finds him locked in a bizarre and increasingly acrimonious eight year feud with his neighbor – that is finally resolved with blasts from a shotgun.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Next Door to Crazy
programme.desc: A teacher and her son get a new start in a Las Vegas home, but soon find themselves the targets of vicious harassment and escalating intimidation by the woman who lives next door. Her fury knows no limits, and there's no telling how far she will go.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Hysteria Lane
programme.desc: A couple who tragically lost their son are thrilled when a family with two boys moves in across the street. But the relationship soon sours, engulfing all of them in conflict, accusation, and finally a deadly shooting.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Alien Files
programme.desc: The final edition of the series examines a range of conspiracy theories relating to extra-terrestrials. There are those who believe that we have already made contact with aliens and that world governments are concealing this.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Deathbed Confessions
programme.desc: Deathbed confessions could provide real evidence of the existence of UFOs. The truth about alien contact is not limited to the military, and in fact, many believe such secrets extend well into outer space, even on Mars itself.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Ancient UFO Earth Landings
programme.desc: There's new evidence pointing to the possibility that ancient man was visited by extraterrestrials, influencing ancient technologies, architecture and art. One scholar reveals evidence supporting his theory that ancient Sumerians were created by aliens.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Science or Sci-Fi?
programme.desc: The science in our nation's history is examined. Explore the myths that infect America's medical history and learn the facts behind America's nuclear age.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Yankees, Rebels and World War II
programme.desc: World War II myths are explored. Forgotten truths of America's Civil War are examined.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Roadside Stories
programme.desc: A whole other story is behind the roads and bridges that cross the United States. On this episode of America's Facts Vs. Fictions learn a woman was the driving force behind completing the Brooklyn Bridge and Route 66 wasn't built from scratch.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Flying Machines
programme.desc: Man created flying devices in order to travel the world and fly into space. Learn about Apollo 11 and how it came home with the help of a pen and about Air Force One, which is not a machine, but a code name.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Yankees, Rebels and World War II
programme.desc: World War II myths are explored. Forgotten truths of America's Civil War are examined.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Roadside Stories

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Flying Machines

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Science or Sci-Fi?
programme.desc: The science in our nation's history is examined. Explore the myths that infect America's medical history and learn the facts behind America's nuclear age.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Ancient UFO Earth Landings

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Deathbed Confessions
programme.desc: Deathbed confessions could provide real evidence of the existence of UFOs. The truth about alien contact is not limited to the military, and in fact, many believe such secrets extend well into outer space, even on Mars itself.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Helicopters
programme.desc: A superior aerial force changes the stakes of any battle. Take a look at some of the fastest, deadliest attack helicopters soaring over combat zones today.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Fighters
programme.desc: America's fighter planes are renowned as the world's deadliest and most dominant aerial assassins. Explore the top fighters ever, and look at what the future holds.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Guns
programme.desc: The guns used in modern warfare are a terrifying fusion of unparalleled accuracy, range and stopping power. Take an inside look at the most ubiquitous and fundamental assets on the battlefield.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Retreat from Reality
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler is determined to fight to the very end, even if it costs millions of Germans their lives. He puts his faith in his the 'Wunderwaffe' and the 'wonder weapons,' including the first ever ballistic missile, the V2.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Hitler's Highways
programme.desc: Hitler promises to make Germany great again by creating 14,000 miles of freeway and building one and half million 'People's Cars' every year. Instead, the Nazi war economy relies on millions of forced labourers and prisoners.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: The Industry of War
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to rebuild Germany's military strength after the destruction of almost all its weaponry in the First World War. To overcome his country's dire shortage of raw materials, he plans to steal them from other countries.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: A Culture of Control
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to change the way German people think and feel by creating a new, Nazi form of art and culture. He takes over the film industry and radio stations, giving the Nazis complete control over every image and message his people receive.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Designed for Power
programme.desc: Hitler's mastery of propaganda, and instinct for effective design, used to create everything from the swastika flag to the striking uniforms of the storm troopers, help win huge support for the Nazi party, a vital step in its march towards total power.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Himmler's Empire of Terror
programme.desc: Hitler's bid for power depends on his most loyal, and violent supporters: the SS. Using surveillance, detention, and even murder, they defeat political enemies and are most responsible for putting Hitler's deadly policy of racial purity into practice.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Adolf Hitler
programme.desc: On June 22, 1941, Adolf Hitler launches the largest military offensive in history against the Soviet Union: Operation Barbarossa. Blinded by his fire power, Hitler signs his death sentence.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Secret Weapons
programme.desc: Discover the unknown stories of some of the incredible plots, ploys and people behind America's secret weapons during the Cold War, the Vietnam War, and WWII.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: No Longer Grandma's House
programme.desc: After inheriting his family's Cape Cod cottage in Bethany Beach, Delaware, a man realizes it looks like grandma still lives in the home. Marnie plans to bring the house up to date by ripping out the old wood paneling and more.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Big Beach Dreams
programme.desc: Marnie's friend Leslie has achieved her dream of buying a beautiful house on the beach, but it needs a lot of work. Now she needs Marnie's help to turn it into the beach home and entertaining hub she's always dreamed about.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Blown-out Beach House
programme.desc: A family with many fond memories of summer vacations in their Lewes, Delaware, beach house finds that their cottage's awkward layout isn't working. The space is maximized by vaulting the ceiling as well as adding an open-concept ground floor.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Pie-shaped Problem House
programme.desc: A couple loves to host family at their home in Dewey Beach, DE, but no one wants to stay in their tiny, awkwardly shaped guest house. With a limited budget, Marnie gets creative and bold with her design choices to transform the house.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: A House Built on Sand
programme.desc: A couple's beach cottage in Dewey, Delaware, is just a few steps to the beach, but the house has no curb appeal and feels dated. They enlist Marnie to give it a face lift, but during demolition, Marnie finds that the foundation is sinking into the sand.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Sun Room to Fun Room
programme.desc: After years of pleading from their daughters, this couple has agreed to renovate their '90s themed house. Now it's up to Marnie to bring their house into the 21st century and make it comfortable enough for three generations.

programme.title: Restored: Dutch Colonial Done Right
programme.desc: Brett restores a 1918 Dutch Colonial home in Upland, California for a woman moving back in with her mother. The family would like to see the house restored to its former glory. Brett quickly learns this house is a time capsule full of discoveries.

programme.title: Restored: Victorian Bungalow Style
programme.desc: Brett explores the history and charm of Victorian Bungalow-style architecture with two of his favorite restoration.

programme.title: Restored: Mystery of the English Cottage
programme.desc: A young family has purchased a 1920s English cottage in Redlands, California, for their forever home. Something is funky with the living room and they can't figure out what. Brett solves the mystery, removing all the 1970s additions.

programme.title: Restored: 1913 Mission Revival Mansion
programme.desc: Brett Waterman helps a mother and her grown-up children restore their majestic 1913 Mission Revival mansion. He's elated when he realizes he can restore the original linoleum in the kitchen, but the homeowners may not open to the idea.

programme.title: Tiny House, Big Living: Tiny Home, Big Adventures
programme.desc: High school sweethearts are ready to take time to focus on themselves, travel the country and live the minimalist lifestyle in a tiny home of their own. They customize their 304-square-foot dream home with a wood stove, bed and full-size shower.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Tiny House, Big Living: Charlestonian Dream 'Tiny'
programme.desc: A family of four brings the unique character of Charleston, South Carolina into their tiny house build. They include traditional touches on the outside like a shell stone path, and the Southern charm flows indoors with wood countertops and a sitting area.

programme.title: Tiny House, Big Living: Model's Tiny Dream House
programme.desc: A model from Boston is heading west to LA to further his career in the fashion industry, so he builds a tiny home that is every bit as fashionable as he is.

programme.title: Tiny House, Big Living: Tiny Upcycled Island Home
programme.desc: A cruise-ship bartender gets help to build a tiny house to park on her parents' San Juan Island property. Her design includes recycled materials from her dad's collection. The 328 square foot design is sure to feel huge compared to a ship's cabin.

programme.title: Tiny House, Big Living: Not So Tiny House
programme.desc: After being diagnosed with epilepsy, a woman is ready for more independence and her master craftsman father is harnessing his talents to build her a unique tiny home that expands.

programme.title: Tiny House, Big Living: Off-Grid Tiny
programme.desc: A family of five builds a charming off-grid tiny house on 20 acres in northern Idaho. The family all pitch in helping to build a wood cook stove, a fireplace, an open kitchen and custom wood countertops. The off-grid adventure also continues outside.

programme.title: Tiny House, Big Living: Athlete's Tiny Training Home
programme.desc: A young outdoorsy couple follows their dream of becoming homeowners with no problems downsizing. This Colorado abode will include locally-sourced beetle kill pine and a slick hidden dog food feeder for their three pups.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Open-Concept Canal Home
programme.desc: Karen's 30-year-old canal-side home has an enormous backyard and attractive deck area, but its choppy 1980s layout and awkward additions aren't functional for entertaining. Marnie has big plans for it including an indoor and outdoor kitchen renovation.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Captain's Paradise
programme.desc: A former ship captain and his wife decide to buy a classic beach cottage a block away from the water. The location is perfect but the interior of the home has structural and layout flaws.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Bethany Beach
programme.desc: Jim and Tina have purchased a 1930s beach cottage in Bethany Beach, Delaware for their family. The house has a few charming touches, but a lot of aesthetic and structural issues.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Backyard Beauty
programme.desc: Being close to the water in South Bethany, Delaware means unwanted wear and tear on Jay and Christine's back deck. They enlist Marnie to update and renovate the space.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Boxed in at the Beach
programme.desc: Chris and Danielle's cottage in Bethany Beach, Delaware, is too cramped for their family of five. Marnie attempts to convert the wasted deck space and bare backyard into a spacious beach escape.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Flood-Ridden to Fabulous
programme.desc: Due to the layout of their property, Tom and Kim's spacious backyard gets overrun by flooding during thunderstorms. They enlist Marnie to make the yard flood-proof and transform the impractical space into an outdoor living area.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Pool With a View
programme.desc: Paul and Brian learn the hard way that it isn't always so sunny in California as they transform an odd-shaped outdoor space into an elevated pool with an ocean view.

programme.title: Pool Kings: The Stakes Are High
programme.desc: A young family recently relocated to College Grove, TN and they desperately miss having a pool to enjoy. With a major elevation issue in their new backyard, Kyle and his team have a challenging build to tackle.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Pool Party Paradise
programme.desc: Tony and Paul help a couple build their dream pool to go along with their newly built outdoor entertaining space. The guys are challenged to design around a giant concrete slab by creating a feature-packed pool that fits with the new space.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Mountaintop Luxury Lagoon
programme.desc: The Leasure family's new house in the hills above Folsom, CA, comes with breathtaking lakeside views, and their big pool dreams will make it a perfect home. But rocky soil and tricky plumbing designs create a big challenge for the team.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Tennessee Dream Pool
programme.desc: The Yarbrough family, Franklin Tennessee locals, call upon the experts at Peek Pools and Spas to build their dream pool.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Million Dollar View Pool
programme.desc: The King family seeks help building their new palace in the sunny hills of California. The Pool Kings find themselves between a rock ledge and hard design while bringing this build to life on a sloped property.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Lake View Paradise
programme.desc: A couple wants to build their daughter a backyard oasis that also accentuates their beautiful lake views.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Cancun in Every Corner
programme.desc: The kings pull out all the stops to maximize an Orange County family's backyard. The shady and dated space is transformed into a three-tiered vacation paradise the family can enjoy at home.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Scary Good Smoked Meat
programme.desc: In San Diego, Michael Symon chows down on fish tacos with housemade blue corn tortillas and a meaty Mexican pizza. In Denver, a local Colorado lamb patty is a remake of a traditional Hawaiian hangover cure, the Loco Moco.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Barbecue Boss of All Sandwiches
programme.desc: In Palm Springs, Calif., Michael Symon sinks his teeth into a meaty stacked sandwich and a beefy ballpark dog. In Oklahoma City, a gas station-turned-burger joint serves a fried apple and brie cheeseburger to fuel the soul.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smoked, Stuffed and Smothered
programme.desc: In San Diego, Michael Symon devours a delicious dumpling-inspired pork and shrimp burger and an elevated pub food classic. In Shreveport, La., a wood-fired pizza is topped with spicy roast chicken and sweet corn.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Bayou Barbecue and Saucy Skillets
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Las Vegas, Nev., with a skillet full of pork belly chili and a mega-pancake that's the ultimate collision of apple pie and brunch.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Hog Heaven
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is in pig paradise, cooking up two whole hogs in two different styles.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Swords and Spits
programme.desc: Chef Roger Mooking visits chefs using unusual tools over live fires. In Georgia, Roger meets Erik Niel, a chef that loves to break out of his butcher shop to cook outdoors.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Florida Heat
programme.desc: Roger Mooking cruises the Florida coastline for two fiery cookouts that bring the heat. First, he visits Chef Marcel Vizcarra, owner of modern Peruvian eatery Llama Restaurant in St. Augustine, Fla.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Queens of 'Cue
programme.desc: Roger meets with two Southern ladies famous in the barbecue world. In Nashville, Roger has eyes only for the smoked ribs at Mary's Old Fashioned Pit Bar-B-Que.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Sandwich Obsession

programme.title: Food Paradise: New 'Cue on the Block
programme.desc: From a smoked Thanksgiving sandwich to barbecued brisket with Mexican flair and a whole hog take on porchetta, chefs across America are finding cool ways to innovate on the grate.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Chowin' Down the Mississippi River
programme.desc: The best eats along the banks of America's greatest river are highlighted, from jazz-inspired barbecue and mouth-watering meatloaf to seafood-smothered fried green tomatoes and garden-fresh ratatouille.

programme.desc: Roger Mooking searches for the best food to eat on the fly, from food trucks and roadside stands to walk-up counters and carnival fare.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Appetizers
programme.desc: Roger Mooking starts the meal off right with 15 of the best appetizers in the United States. From nachos and chicken wings to oysters, fries and more, Roger's going coast-to-coast to find the best!

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fire And Family
programme.desc: Roger Mooking heads to the South to visit two family-run barbecue joints that have been passing down recipes and rigs for generations.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Meat In Full Swing
programme.desc: Roger Mooking meets up with a few culinary titans in Tennessee who are swinging for the fences with outrageous rigs. At Wedge Oak Farm in Lebanon, Tenn., he joins Chef Trey Cioccia, owner of Nashville's Black Rabbit, to set up the Burn Tower.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Raising the Heat
programme.desc: Roger Mooking visits the Lone Star State, where they're taking open-fire cooking to new culinary heights with unique rigs. In Fort Worth, Texas, chef and restaurateur Lou Lambert invites Roger to his ranch to slow-roast whole hogs over oak coals.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Beef and Beyond
programme.desc: Beef is king in Texas, and Roger Mooking visits two pitmasters who are elevating traditional smoked meats with exciting global flavours. In Pearland, Texas, he helps Ronnie Killen season and smoke brisket and beef ribs to serve at Killen's Barbecue.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Smoking and Spit-Roasting in Texas
programme.desc: Roger Mooking finds two chefs in Texas who are pushing the boundaries of whole hog barbecue, where pigs are roasted low and slow over coals before the meat is chopped or pulled and seasoned with sauce.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Get Your Grill On
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is in Lockhart, Texas, to meet the team responsible for designing and crafting a monster rig that offers seven different cooking contraptions.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Some Like It Popped
programme.desc: Noah hits the Big Butler Fair in Prospect, PA., where he tears into the Conevore, filled to the brim with smoked brisket, pork and chicken.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: When Harry Met Salad
programme.desc: Noah Cappe's first stop is the Wayne County Fair in Richmond, Ind., where he takes a stroll with the Walking BBQ, feels the groove of the King with a bacon PB&J quesadilla, goes healthy-ish with a deep fried salad.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Dawn of the Bread
programme.desc: Noah Cappe cruises up the west coast, starting at the Columbia County Fair in St. Helens, Ore. First up is a traditional Indian fry bread stuffed with some non-traditional ingredients, then Noah dives into the coastal fusion of the great Pacific pita.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Meat, Pray, Love
programme.desc: Noah Cappe starts at the Delaware State Fair, where he'll eat the very stately Delaware Dog, a hot dog loaded with scrapple. Then, he'll try to tackle the funnel cake-filled Frankenfunnel Burger and the octopus-loaded Octotaco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Fryin' King
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the Big Fresno Fair in California for the debut of some new fair foods, including the Flamin' Hot Chimichanga and Rainbow Shrimp Fries.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Fries in Disguise
programme.desc: Noah Cappe arrives at the Volusia County Fair in Florida, where two carnival classics get a makeover for the cheesy tater corndog and the black forest funnel cake.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Frankenfoods
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson goes through a full day of mind-blowing food combinations, from new takes on old favorites to presentations that aren't quite what they appear to be. These pairings keep diners guessing and leave their taste buds begging for more.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Veg Out
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson shares home-cooked meals that are packed with locally grown veggies straight from the plant or prepared in a way that no vegetable has ever dreamed. Get ready to veg out with a full day of eats- without the meat!

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Stripe Out/ A Splashy Delivery

programme.desc: Two puppies who love to have fun take on adventures around their neighbourhood.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Hissy's Big Day/ Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly try to cheer Hissy up by taking her to their favourite places. Later, A.R.F. is reprogrammed to take the pugs where they want, but not being them back.

programme.title: Mira, Royal Detective: The Rakhi Mystery/ Mystery Below the Palace
programme.desc: When the bracelets that Mira and her friends made for the Rakhi holiday disappear, Mira sets out to find them before the celebration starts. When strange sounds are heard at the palace, Queen Shanti asks Mira to find out what is causing the ruckus.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Hiccup Hazard/ The Great Robot Race
programme.desc: Pip’s hiccups threaten their delivery so he asks Freddy to do the impossible: scare them out of him. Pip and Freddy have to prove that delivery birds are better than a stork drone.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Temple of the Tiger/ The Gift-Mazing Birthday
programme.desc: Freddy and Pip try their hardest to keep a baby tiger prince clean; Freddy tries to find the perfect birthday present for one of the new babies.

programme.title: Bluey: The Weekend / BBQ / Fruitbat
programme.desc: Bluey and her family play a game in the garden; Bingo searches for ingredients for a salad; Bluey dreams about a fruit bat.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Puggy-ology/ Squirrels Just Wanna Have Fun
programme.desc: The pugs travel to an archeology site to find artifacts for Bob's sister. Then, when a noisy squirrel keeps Bob from getting work done, the pugs must work together to get the squirrel back to its family.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: One Small Ruff for Pup-kind / The Lost Bouncy Ball
programme.desc: The pups head to Space Camp to give a dog toy to Chloe; The pups get help to find their bouncy ball.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob and Ana's Bubble Bummer/ Seen Any Seashells?
programme.desc: The Playcare float breaks down before the People and Pets Parade! The Pugs and Keia head out on an ocean-bound mission to find the perfect seashell for Ana!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Design-a-dog/ Ice, Ice Puggy
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly accidentally chew Bob's childhood toy. Then, when Bobo's icemaker breaks, the pugs go to Antarctica to get him ice.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Bouncy Bouncy Baby/ Like Cats and Dogs
programme.desc: Pip gets locked inside a crate with a baby kangaroo. Pip and Freddy must teach squabbling kitten and puppy siblings to share.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Bringing This Family Home/ Flight of the Penguin
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy help fly KC's family home to meet their new baby cousin! The Junior Fliers try to deliver two babies at once.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: The Scrapiest Dragon/ Going for Broke
programme.desc: During a ping pong match with Hallie, Stuffy scrapes his belly on the ground. Later, Awesome Guy is focused more on winning than his safety when he decides to compete in every event of the McStuffins Toyathalon.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Puzzling Pugs/ Rhapsody in Pug
programme.desc: When Bob can't finish his jigsaw puzzle without a picture of a leopard, Bingo and Rolly go searching for one. The pugs unintentionally create chaos when they go to the symphony.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bingo and Rolly's Playcare Picnic Party/ Judge Rolly
programme.desc: The Pugs throw Keia a picnic when she can't attend the Playcare's picnic in the park! Rolly gets carried away when he designates himself as judge to keep the peace at Playcare!

programme.title: Bluey: Grannies / Yoga Ball / Calypso
programme.desc: Bingo and Bluey have a question for their Nana; Mum teaches Bingo how to use her bark; Bluey and her friends learn from their teacher, Calypso.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Animal and the Magic Mummy / The Friends of Zorna Club
programme.desc: Animal accidentally brings a troublemaking mummy to life while at the museum. When Gonzo starts a Zorna Club, he insists only those who have proven they truly love Zorna can join.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Knitwits/ Dimmsdale's Got Talent?
programme.desc: Dad takes Mom on what he thinks is a knight-themed cruise to renew their vows, but it's really a knitting cruise. Mr. Bickels hosts a talent show and everyone gets in, but Timmy.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Crockin' the House/ Tardy Sauce
programme.desc: Mrs. Crocker leaves Mr. Crocker home alone for the first time, so he calls on Timmy to teach him how to have fun. Chloe wants to break the attendance record, but Timmy tells her school is canceled and drags her to a taco stand.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Cat Sitter/ Addicted
programme.desc: Theodore gets stuck taking care of Miss Croner's cats during the week. Dave wants the boys to focus only on school. The Chipettes challenge the Chipmunks to go three hours without their favorite things.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: World Day/ Between a Rope and a Hard Place
programme.desc: To celebrate 'World Day' and win a trip, the Chipmunks each get a country to represent for a school presentation. Then, Coach Dobkins kicks Cheesy and Theodore off the track team for being slow, but Theodore is determined to compete.

programme.title: Movie: Tooth Fairy
programme.desc: After stealing a dollar from his girlfriend's child, a minor league hockey player is ordered to fill the role of the Tooth Fairy. While bumbling through the process, he rediscovers his childhood dreams and learns how to follow his heart.

programme.title: The Loud House: No Laughing Matter/ No Spoilers
programme.desc: When Luan overhears her siblings complaining about her comedy, she decides to give it up. Knowing Leni's history of spoiling surprises, the kids don't tell her about Mom's upcoming party.

programme.title: The Loud House: Legends/ Mall of Duty
programme.desc: Dad and Lincoln get on 'Legends of the Hidden Temple' and are excited for a day of bonding. Lincoln wants to go to the mall and has to bring his sisters along.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Little Yellow Book/ Bumper to Bumper
programme.desc: Squidward finds SpongeBob's diary, and starts reading it out loud in the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Wormy/ Patty Hype
programme.desc: The gang thinks that Sandy's pet caterpillar has been consumed by a 'monster' butterfly; Bob markets his coloured crabcakes to the Krusty Krab's clientele.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Chimps Ahoy/ Ghost House
programme.desc: The Chimpanzee beneficiaries of Sandy's undersea tree dome are paying a visit to see what progress she has made with her inventions. The Flying Dutchman takes up residence at SpongeBob's house.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Grandma's Kisses/ Squidville
programme.desc: Bob's Grandma gives him a kiss in public; Squid decides to leave.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: All That Glitters/ Wishing You Well
programme.desc: SpongeBob's spatula breaks mid-patty flip; Mr. Krabs installs a wishing well near the Krusty Krab and sends SpongeBob down the well in a bucket to collect the coins.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: No Free Rides/ I'm Your Biggest Fanatic
programme.desc: Spongebob attempts and fails his driving test again; Bob tries to join a special club.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Bummer Vacation/ Wigstruck
programme.desc: SpongeBob has never taken a vacation, so Krabs makes his #1 employee take the day off.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pressure/ Smoking Peanut

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Original Fry Cook/ Night Light

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Graveyard Shift/ Krusty Love
programme.desc: The Krusty Krab is now open 24 hours a day; Mr. Krabs is smitten with Ms. Puff.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Born to Be Wild/ Best Frenemies
programme.desc: Spongebob must protect the town from a biker gang; new smoothies are the talk of the town.

programme.desc: SpongeBob's good intentions and overzealous nature create chaos in an underwater city.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Coffee Quest/ Phoenix Rises
programme.desc: When Big City faces a coffee bean shortage, Cricket and Gloria’s boss, Ms. Cho, challenges them to retrieve one of a few remaining sacks of coffee; When the Greens' dog, Phoenix, runs away from home, the family sets out to find her.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Little Dipper
programme.desc: Dipper feels self-conscious that Mabel is taller than him and is becoming the alpha twin, so he seeks out a magic way to grow himself the same height. Lil' Gideon takes advantage of Dipper's and Mabel's height discrepancies.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Secret(s) of Castle McDuck!
programme.desc: On a family trip to Scrooge's ancestral castle, Dewey tries to hide the truth about his mom as his brothers search for family secrets.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Great Dime Chase!

programme.title: Big City Greens: Hurty Tooth / Sleepover Sisters

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricketsitter/ Backflip Bill
programme.desc: Bill takes Gramma to a doctor’s checkup and leaves Tilly in charge of Cricket. Cricket learns that Bill never realized his childhood dream of becoming a gymnast.

programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: The Owl House: Once Upon a Swap

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Dancing With the Enemy/ Tattler's Tale
programme.desc: When Kick gets paired with his nemesis in a dance competition, they must put their differences aside and combine their styles in order to win. Later, Kick devises a plan to stop his nosy neighbour's incessant tattling.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Switching Gears/ Garage Banned
programme.desc: Kick's bike is badly damaged hours before the annual BMX Rodeo. The competition gets fierce when Kick decides to ride the Mustang Menace, a supposedly untameable bike. Brad forms a band and takes over the garage, so Kick decides to form his own band.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Obsession: For Kick/ Flush and Release
programme.desc: Gunther tries to convince Kick that a girl named Jackie is becoming more than his biggest fan. Kick learns about a legendary giant goldfish roaming the waters of the flood Gully.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: K-Nein/ Bromance
programme.desc: Kick rescues an injured stray dog, but when he discovers she's a safety dog, trained to prevent accidents, Kick must decide between keeping the dog and being a daredevil.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Snowpolcalypse!/ According to Chimp
programme.desc: Kick causes the school bus to get trapped during a blizzard. Later, Kick brings home a lost chimp named Dr. Awesome and makes it his new pet. Kick soon realizes that the apparently cute little primate becomes destructive without chocolate bananas.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Poll Position/ Jock Wilder's Nature Camp
programme.desc: Kendall runs for class president in order to make Kick's life miserable. So, he decides to get Wacky and Jackie elected instead, but their agenda might even be worse. Kick decides to make Jock Wilder's Nature camp more awesome.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Morning Rush/ A Fistful of Ice Cream
programme.desc: In order to not fail the school year, Kick has one night to complete all of his missed homework assignments; To give his dad the best birthday gift ever, Kick tracks down a rare ice cream treat.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Say Cheese/ Pinch Sitter
programme.desc: Kick and his siblings must overcome their differences to replace a picture they broke.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Hand in Hand/ Luigi Vendetta
programme.desc: Kick and Kendall accidentally get their hands stuck together by a rare cave sap and must get un-stuck without being seen. Sick of Brad's bullying, Kick hires someone to 'take care of' Brad.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Meathead Justice/ Bwar-Mart
programme.desc: After Kick saves the DiPazzi twins' lives, they become indebted to him by their code of ethics. When they do not leave his side, he must go to extreme measures to get them out of his life.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Pool Daze/ Live-In Wade
programme.desc: Kick leads his friends in a battle for freedom and fun when the lifeguards at the community pool force them to stay in the kiddie pool.

programme.desc: A high school basketball coach transforms his team into champions, but then prevents them from playing until they improve their grades.

programme.title: Movie: Moonlight in Vermont
programme.desc: When Fiona gets dumped she heads for a week in Vermont at her Dad's country Inn. There she runs into her ex with his new girlfriend. She strikes a deal with the Inn's chef, Derek, to be her 'boyfriend' for the week.

programme.title: Movie: Summer in the Vineyard
programme.desc: A couple are gearing up for 'Summer Fest,' their town's largest event where they will be unveiling their new wine. To everyone's shock, his brother announces his return to town, where he purchases the history B&B.

programme.title: Movie: My One and Only
programme.desc: Two contestants on the television show 'The One' find out if they're destined to be together, but then a handsome rancher acting as a guide swoops in.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Vacation
programme.desc: The girls' dream vacation in the Caribbean turns out to be far from what was advertised in the brochure. While the girls are away, Sophia romances the gardener.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Joust Between Friends
programme.desc: Laid off from work, Dorothy searches for part-time work which leads to Blanche getting her a job at the museum. Then fur flies when Dorothy is handed the job of organizing a banquet, the duty Blanche was hoping for.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Love, Rose
programme.desc: Rose places an ad in the personals column and she is let down when she doesn't hear an immediate response. This leads Blanche and Dorothy to begin responding under the name Isaac Newton.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: 'Twas the Nightmare Before Christmas
programme.desc: The girls each plan to spend Christmas with their families but a series of strange occurrences lead them to spend Christmas together in Miami.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Sisters
programme.desc: As a birthday present for Sophia, Dorothy brings Sophia's sister over from Sicily.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Stan Who Came to Dinner

programme.title: Frasier: We Two Kings

programme.title: Frasier: Door Jam

programme.title: Frasier: The Harassed
programme.desc: Frasier is forced to share his desk and show with the station's new finance reporter.

programme.title: Frasier: Lilith Needs a Favor

programme.title: Frasier: Daphne Does Dinner
programme.desc: Hoping to avoid another infamous Crane dinner party catastrophe, Niles lets Daphne cook.

programme.title: Frasier: Trophy Girlfriend
programme.desc: Searching for a squash partner for a tournament, Frasier teams up with a sexy gym coach.

programme.title: Frasier: Fraternal Schwinns
programme.desc: Pressured into participating in a bike-a-thon, Frasier must learn to ride a bicycle.

programme.title: Frasier: Kenny on the Couch
programme.desc: Frasier agrees to council a depressed Kenny in the aftermath of his recent divorce.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Fred and Ethel Fight

programme.title: I Love Lucy: The Moustache
programme.desc: Lucy glues a white beard to her face in order to convince Ricky not to grow a moustache.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: The Gossip

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Pioneer Women
programme.desc: The women rebel against modern conveniences and turn the clock back several hundred years.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Actor

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Before and After

programme.title: The Golden Girls: And Then There Was One
programme.desc: Sophia readies herself for participating in a walkathon. Meanwhile, Dorothy, Blanche, and Rose babysit for the walkathon participants' children. But when the event is over, a baby is left unclaimed.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Bedtime Story

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Forgive Me, Father

programme.desc: When the shift supervisor at work suddenly dies, Doug gets his job and Carrie is thrilled.

programme.desc: Doug makes plans to hang out with Richie, until Ray Barone suggests a game of golf.

programme.desc: Doug ends up in Dr. Becker's waiting room after being hit by a foul ball at a Mets game.

programme.desc: Doug is disappointed when Carrie isn't jealous of his beautiful new trainee.

programme.desc: Doug embarrasses Carrie when he arrives unprepared at her boss's elegant cocktail party.

programme.desc: The neighbours are separating and have a time-share for sale in the Hamptons.
