programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Deadly Ambition
programme.desc: A shooting at the University of Alabama Huntsville leaves three professors dead and the community questioning how they missed a murderer in their midst.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Poisonous Affair
programme.desc: When cancer researcher Dr. George Blumenschein ends up admitted at his own hospital a toxic work environment may be to blame.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Where the Blood Drops
programme.desc: This is the story of a woman convicted of her husband's murder, whose son was so convinced of her innocence that he enrolled in law school.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Punch Line
programme.desc: A patient in a hospital emergency room says he cut his hand on a dumpster, but the doctor recognizes the injury as something else. That doctor became the chief witness in a crime involving the murder of a 67-year-old grandmother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Paintball
programme.desc: In 1962, the people of the small town of Hanford, California lost their sense of peace when one of their own, 15 year-old Marlene Miller, was murdered. It would take 24 years to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign Here
programme.desc: A young woman walked out of a department store, got into a rental car, and was never seen again. The signature on the rental car agreement turned out to be a forgery.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shadow of a Doubt
programme.desc: An unknown assailant walked into a retail store and fired three shots, killing the owner. Police had suspects, but all of them had alibis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tourist Trap
programme.desc: Bite marks lead the police to a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Traces of Truth
programme.desc: A high school gym teacher took time off from class to give his friend a ride home -- and never returned. Investigators suspected foul play, but without a body the case would be difficult to prove.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Honor Thy Father
programme.desc: A 16-year-old girl is killed by her mother and father in her own home. The parents say they acted in self-defence but the forensic evidence indicates otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stick 'em Up
programme.desc: When a bank president is found floating in a nearby lake, taped to a chair, forensic experts start piecing together the tape and discover a missing piece. It's this piece, and tips pouring in from residents, that will lead to a capture.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Head Games
programme.desc: To celebrate one year of marriage, a young couple goes on a camping trip. When the husband is shot and killed, the wife is so distraught she gives two different stories of what happened. When forensic psychiatry intervenes, the truth is finally learned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Alibi
programme.desc: When 17-year-old Crystal Faye Todd was raped and murdered in her small town, one of her male acquaintances’ DNA matched semen at the crime scene. It raised the question, why would he volunteer for a DNA sample?

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Purr-fect Match
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bio-Attack
programme.desc: A religious cult's bizarre plot to overthrow the government using germ warfare.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: A woman is found dead of a gunshot wound and police conclude that she was murdered by her husband. Forensic scientists were able to piece together the clues and determine what really happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherhoods
programme.desc: Police suspect white supremacists when a gay couple is killed in their bed. Shell casings, some chips of paint and shards of glass help link their suspects to a string of hate crimes across the state of California.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair of the Dog
programme.desc: With no forensic evidence found at a murder scene, investigators were baffled. But they suspected that the victim's dog had witnessed the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Breaking News
programme.desc: When a young reporter is murdered in her apartment, and the two suspects are cleared of any wrongdoing, police must turn to a databank of well over 8000 felons to catch the killer, leading to the first conviction in the U.S, based on this evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All the World's a Stage
programme.desc: Police must investigate one of their own when a detective says his wife shot herself in the head. While he claims he called 911 as soon as he could, evidence makes police doubt the detective's story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pure Evil
programme.desc: In 1993, two Texas teenagers, a 14-year-old boy and his 13-year-old stepsister, were brutally murdered. It took forensic evidence and a behavioral profile to identify their killer as Jason Massey, who had a history of torturing animals.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Root of All Evil
programme.desc: Prosecutors turned to a plant pathologist and a dendrochronologist to solve a missing person's case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Where the Blood Drops

programme.desc: Mark, Digger and Tim judge as top amateur distillers from both sides of the law compete to make mezcal, the moonshine of Mexico. Using agave mash, regional recipes and even meat, only one competitor will earn the title of Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Mountain Brandy
programme.desc: Legal and outlaw distillers compete head-to-head to see who makes a classic Appalachian tradition called Mountain Brandy. Judged by moonshine legends Mark, Digger and Tim, only the best will have what it takes to be named Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Mark vs. Digger vs. Tim
programme.desc: Tickle hosts as Appalachia's most notorious moonshiners go head-to-head in a moonshine distilling competition. Mark, Digger and Tim run their own secret recipes to be judged by the public to determine once and for all who makes the best shine.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Guns, Girls and Gamblers
programme.desc: Mike and his wife Valerie crash a high-stakes poker game to learn the location of a jet. Ken and Danny hunt down the luxury yacht of a womanizing sleaze bag. And Kevin has his life threatened when he attempts to repo a debtor's crop duster.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Ken Gets Played
programme.desc: A debtor suddenly swipes the helicopter that Ken and Danny were only seconds away from repossessing. Mike Kennedy enlists the help of his wife, Valerie, in a daring plot to seize a charter jet. Kevin is swarmed by FBI agents after an exhausting repo.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Flying Blind
programme.desc: Repo Man Ken Cage attempts to nab two high-end yachts in two days. Kevin Lacey's favour for a friend turns into a white-knuckle landing under darkening Texas skies in a plane with no radio on a runway with no lights.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: South of the Border
programme.desc: Mike Kennedy repos a chopper from the roof of a corporate high-rise. Kevin Lacey infiltrates a Mexican ranch to snatch a family plane stolen by a wayward brother. Ken and Danny find themselves up against a rival repo team.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: No Safe Harbor
programme.desc: Mike and his wife go undercover to repo a go-fast boat. Ken and Danny bring in some talented friends to pull off a rare simultaneous triple repo, and Kevin attempts to swipe a deadbeat flight school's entire fleet of Cessnas.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Two If by Air, One If by Sea
programme.desc: Ken and Danny seize a luxury yacht and the debtor comes after them full-force. Mike devises a solution to get even with the deadbeat who bought his favourite plane and stopped paying. Kevin and Heather find themselves in the middle of a mid-air nightmare.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Panic at 10,000
programme.desc: Over the skies of North Texas, Kevin and Heather have grabbed themselves a Lear jet. But when a mechanical failure leads to a dangerous imbalance in the jet's fuel load, Kevin Lacey must descend through a building storm to make an emergency landing.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Mid-Air Repo
programme.desc: At one of the biggest aviation expos in the country, Ken and Danny track down a vintage Stearman biplane. Mike Kennedy helps an old pilot retrieve his stolen skywriting plane, and Kevin and Heather pose as tourists in order to attempt a rare mid-air repo.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Perfect Storm
programme.desc: A pregnant woman is shot in the abdomen but refuses testing and treatment, jeopardizing her and the baby's lives. A doctor is the victim of a car burglary, and thinks her patient may be the culprit. A storm is preventing a patient's life-saving surgery.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Warning: Cystem Shutdown!
programme.desc: Gerard is lumpy, he has nearly a hundred lumps varying in size that coat his entire body. Gina has bloody lesions all over, and nobody has been able to help her. Eric has a large bump on his head that that he calls his "on/off button."

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Romancing the Lump

programme.desc: Jen has substantial growths on her ears that cause her depression, pain, and vertigo. Juliet is under emotional distress because of the bumps all over her neck and chest. Gerald has a mysterious, kiwi-size lump on his middle finger.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: In Sickness and in Wealth

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Kate

programme.desc: To afford his dream of becoming a pro-wrestler, Matt has reduced his spending to just $300 a month. Extreme Cheapskate Sarah saves on groceries by never leaving one of her family's catering events without leftovers.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Roy and Ben

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Give Me Some Mo!
programme.desc: The kitchen is more fun when Sunny Anderson and "Beach Bites'" Katie Lee decide who will take on Bobby Flay. Puerto Rican chef Andre Gomez and Dominican chef Ramon Perez duke it out in the kitchen for their shot at the master.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Farmer and the Belle
programme.desc: Georgia "chefarmer" Matthew Raiford and Boston chef Karen Akunowicz compete for their chance to take on Bobby Flay. Special guests Iron Chef Michael Symon and food expert Simon Majumdar offer their advice on how to beat Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Rollin' Deep
programme.desc: The killer combo of Katie Lee and Geoffrey Zakarian arrive in the arena set to take Bobby down. Skills are in abundance when veteran chefs Linda Harrell and Kenny Johnson battle for the chance to show their worth against Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Against All Odds
programme.desc: Alton Brown and Anne Burrell join together to beat Bobby Flay. They bring chefs Heather West and Florian Wehrli for the big battle.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Old School, New School
programme.desc: It's old school versus new school as experienced chef Andrew Evans battles the up and coming chef Brooke Mallory for the chance to Beat Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Poking and Prodding
programme.desc: Judy Gold teams up with Katie Lee for the chance to poke fun at their dear friend Bobby Flay. Alex Stratta and Houman Gohary compete with the hopes to take on Bobby.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: They Must be Giants
programme.desc: Crab claw king, Andy Saint-Ange, stands against tattooed butcher, Bruce Kalman. Judges Scott Conant and Geoffrey Zakarian will decide which chef gets the chance to take down Bobby.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: It's All Gouda
programme.desc: Emotions run high as Anne Burrell and Michael Voltaggio bring in two young chefs to challenge Bobby Flay. The two up-and-comers, Dafna Mizrahi and Jose DeJesus, specialize in Mexican cuisine, and they're not going to play nice.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Leadership Lessons in Florida
programme.desc: Robert Irvine rolls into Titusville, to help Loyd Have Mercy reopen after the COVID-19 shutdown. Robert brings new safety protocols, menu items and lessons on leadership to help the owners save their failing restaurant.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Aged to Perfection
programme.desc: Michael Strahan and Michael Symon have handpicked two chefs hoping to score a touchdown on Bobby Flay's home turf! New York chef Anastacia Song and Southern sweetie Joey Ward are prepared to bring their best game and score the win.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Three of Bobby's closest friends are playing by his rules just to take him down, as Chefs Alex Guarnaschelli and Michael Symon go head-to-head in the arena and Katie Lee leads the charge.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Arrivals and Departures
programme.desc: Vying for a chance to compete against Bobby Flay is no small feat when Iron Chef Alex Guarnaschelli and Iron Chef judge Donatella Arpaia decide who gets the shot.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Food Hall of Fame
programme.desc: New dining experiences and classic comforts are brought together under one roof at these food halls, from spicy fried chicken paired with decadent mac and cheese at Atlanta's Krog Street Market to a pierogi melt at Cleveland's West Side Market.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Nacho Nation
programme.desc: This is 'nacho' average plate of chips and salsa. From filet mignon and Parmesan fondue to Thai chicken and Hawaiian pork, these restaurants are serving up mouth-watering mounds of meat and cheese.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Easy as Pie
programme.desc: From an entire Thanksgiving dinner stuffed into a pie to the Texas-sized Pumpecapple, these friendly shops across America are finding many ways to fill a pie crust.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Time Tested Treasures
programme.desc: Host John Catucci travels to Ontario's wilderness to discover a hidden gem in Busters BBQ, where blueberries are the key to killer sauce. John also visits the Argo Café in Vancouver, B.C. where they serve up everything from your typical diner.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Unexpected Eats
programme.desc: Guy is in search of the most unique offerings of everyday favourites.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: One of a Kind

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Eating Up New Orleans

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Southern Flavor
programme.desc: Guy travels the South to try the unique flavours and authentic favourites from the region.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From the Heart
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's hitting up some spots putting their heart and soul into everything they do. In Carlsbad, Calif., a family-owned Italian joint is staying true to a long-standing ravioli recipe.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Savory Standouts
programme.desc: Guy Fieri goes to Chicago to visit an authentic Cuban joint serving fricassee de pollo. He goes to Memphis to a neighbourhood gastro pub serving dishes like duck fried rice and homemade popcorn. In Annapolis, he savours chipolte habanero barbecue pork.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Dinner and Dessert That Delivers
programme.desc: Guy and his family combine their love of cooking at home and great restaurant food for some takeout. Four DDD alums send ingredients for their best recipes then join Guy and his son via video chat to guide them through the recipes.

programme.title: Christina on the Coast: Sweet Master Suite
programme.desc: A couple who has been steadily renovating their Huntington Beach home has only one room left to conquer. They hope Christina can turn their cramped, dark master suite into the room of their dreams.

programme.desc: Tarek and Christina spot a home that's for sale by its owner in La Puente, California. It's in rough shape to say the least and because it's tenant occupied, they can't look inside.

programme.title: Good Bones: Family Reunion Renovation
programme.desc: Mina works with her Mom to renovate her childhood home.

programme.title: Good Bones: New Clients in the Countryside
programme.desc: Mina and Karen's next home renovation project is far from a flip. This time they travel out of downtown Indianapolis and into the countryside to do a home renovation for new clients Mike and Karen Angle.

programme.title: Good Bones: Beautifying a Boring Boxy Home
programme.desc: Mina has second thoughts that a charmless, boxy house bought from the city for $4,000 might have been a bad idea.

programme.title: Good Bones: Small House, Big Problems
programme.desc: Mina and Karen find that "you get what you pay for" when they buy a bargain house for $5,000.

programme.title: Good Bones: Outdated Townhome Gets a Funky Facelift
programme.desc: Mina and Karen purchase an old townhome in the popular Bates-Hendricks neighborhood. After encountering dry rot and termites, the unpredictable roadblocks put a giant dent in their budget and on their attitudes toward the project.

programme.title: Good Bones: Chop and Pop
programme.desc: Mina and Karen are back in the Bates-Hendricks neighborhood and hoping to turn a profit this time around.

programme.title: Good Bones: Shiplap Surprise in Fountain Square
programme.desc: Mina and Karen revamp a tiny but pricey two-bedroom home on a tight budget. They build additional bedrooms and reconfigure the floor plan to increase functionality. When their contractor mistakenly covers every wall in shiplap, they find design solutions.

programme.title: Good Bones: Chelsea Vibes in Old Southside

programme.desc: Look at why we humans are so different from every other living thing on earth, and whether aliens come into play.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Vanishings
programme.desc: Stories of civilizations large and small disappearing without a trace can be found throughout history and across the globe.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Aliens and Robots
programme.desc: In the 21st century, robots are being programmed to do everything from perform surgery on humans to explore other planets. Also, humanoid robots are rapidly reaching a level of sophistication that was thought to exist only in science fiction.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Destination Mars
programme.desc: Within 20 years, the first human colonizers are expected to reach Mars. Ancient Astronaut theorists suggest that our voyage to Mars could unlock mysteries of our ancient extraterrestrial origins and possibly be the key to long term human survival.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Wisdom Keepers
programme.desc: The Aborigines of Australia are the oldest, continuously surviving society on Earth. The stories preserved in their oral tradition are said to date back over 60,000 years. Their legends are now being scientifically verified by using geological records.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Russia's Secret Files
programme.desc: Ancient astronaut theorists suggest that otherworldly visitations predate the establishment of the Russian nation, and point to the ancient settlement at Arkaim as evidence.

programme.title: Unidentified: Inside America's UFO Investigation: The UFO Insiders
programme.desc: Luis 'Lue' Elizondo, who ran the U.S. government's $22 million secret UFO program leads the team and reveals new details about his Pentagon investigation, which includes new leads. U.S. Navy fight pilots reveal new details about the 'tic-tac' shaped UFO.

programme.title: Unidentified: Inside America's UFO Investigation: Raining UFOs
programme.desc: A former U.S. Navy radar operator reveals the terrifying day it rained UFOs. For the first time, U.S. Navy personnel share new details of the stunning encounter and attempt to explain why UFOs are sighted over oceans, and more.

programme.title: Unidentified: Inside America's UFO Investigation: The Pattern Revealed
programme.desc: The list of military eyewitnesses from the U.S. airspace is growing. Now, a U.S. Navy radar operator has provided more evidence, including actual coordinates where the UFOs have appeared. Lue follows the trail and finds that the crafts are still seen.

programme.desc: The most famous Egyptian king in history ruled for only 10 years before his mysterious death. Using 3-D CT-scan imaging, National Geographic reveals what King Tutankhamun looked like on the day he died and unveils new findings relating to his death.

programme.title: King Tut's Final Secrets

programme.title: Cleopatra: Sex, Lies, and Secrets

programme.title: Lost Kingdom of the Black Pharaohs

programme.title: Attila's Forbidden Tomb
programme.desc: A new, cutting-edge archaeological investigation might reveal the long-lost tomb of Attila the Hun, and with the help of the latest science, experts follow newly unearthed leads to a potentially history-changing discovery.

programme.title: Dead Sea Scrolls: The Doomsday Prophecy

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Cop and the Killer

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Our House of Horrors

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Something Wasn't Right
programme.desc: Beverly Stephens knew something wasn't right with her husband, Reginald Brooks, but never thought there was a killer inside him.

programme.title: Devil Among Us: Blood Brothers

programme.title: A Time to Kill: The Missing Hotelier
programme.desc: When a two-bit Florida criminal is arrested driving a stolen convertible with blood in the backseat and its owner, a 49-year-old hotelier named Sabine Musil-Buehler is reported missing, the case expands to include a possible homicide.

programme.title: Diabolical: Teach Me to Kill
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, a beloved father of four is found dead in his car. He's been bound, gagged, and asphyxiated. Witnesses lead detectives to a local man named John Brian Ray. But this troubled man is just a pawn in the larger game of a criminal mastermind.

programme.title: Devil Among Us: Blood Brothers

programme.title: Diabolical: Accident Waiting to Happen

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Our House of Horrors
programme.desc: Alice Swanson was always envious of the perfect life her childhood neighbor, William Jennings Choyce, and his family seemed to have. But after she married him, she slowly realized that nothing under the surface was as perfect as it seemed.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Shadow of Death
programme.desc: A woman calls 911, whispering that intruders broke into her home, bound her and her son, and attacked her husband. Police arrive and find the husband dead and the killers gone. Investigators struggle to expose the twisted mastermind behind the crime.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Hearts of Darkness

programme.title: Grave Mysteries: Hidden Truths
programme.desc: Indle King hasn't seen his wife Anastasia since she abandoned him at the Moscow airport. After returning to Seattle alone, Indle meets with the detectives tasked with unraveling the series of events that led to his bride's mysterious disappearance.

programme.title: Grave Mysteries: Deadly Connections
programme.desc: January 2013, high school freshman Shaniesha Forbes' body is found on a Brooklyn beach. NYPD Detectives begin piecing together her final moments and discover her social media life including a list of 1,600 Facebook friends and potential suspects.

programme.title: Grave Mysteries: Murder Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: Police find a cast of dangerous characters and uncover a heinous plot in the murder of a single mother.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Nightmare Field
programme.desc: In 2011, Dalene Carlson goes missing, just weeks after relocating to Stockton, California. As investigators search for the missing 23 year-old, a shocking discovery in a nearby cornfield sets them on the trail of a vicious killer.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Dead End Trail
programme.desc: Fear grips the students of Southern Illinois University when the violated body of senior Susan Schumake is discovered near a popular campus trail. Years of tireless investigation finally reveals a remorseless killer.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Kill Now, Pay Later
programme.desc: When an arrest is made in the contract killing of a California businessman, police discover that's just the beginning of the story.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Murder Down Memory Lane
programme.desc: When a 5-year old describes her mother's killer as a 'ninja' police determine the truth about the child's description as they put the surprising killer behind bars.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: My Sister's Keeper

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: Murder Has Two Faces
programme.desc: When her husband cuts her off financially, Diane Hart turns to her older sister for help. Together, the sisters come up with a deadly plan to get at the money Diane feels she deserves.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: The Demon Inside
programme.desc: Charity seems like your typical teenager, she's a popular cheerleader with good grades and and works at the local pizza parlor. But to her mother and sisters, Charity is possessed by a demon that needs to be dealt with.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: Daddy's Girls
programme.desc: Tensions arise when a new addition to the Finkle family shakes up their peaceful dynamic, but no one could predict the fatal and gruesome results to come.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Rebels With a Cause
programme.desc: Rosa parks was not the first African American women to refuse to give up her seat. The Berlin Airlift included candy for kids. One of the great rifles used in war was invented by a man who made moonshine.

programme.title: What History Forgot: To the Ends of the World

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Brothels
programme.desc: Discover the real story behind one of society's most clandestine institutions: brothels. Hidden within these bordellos are secrets about famous patrons, governments, and even religion.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Las Vegas
programme.desc: Unravel the seamy secrets of Las Vegas. Where Mobsters once ruled. Where casinos suck you in to keep you playing and losing. See why this was a Nazi target for wartime sabotage, a test ground for atomic bombs and a meeting place for 9/11's terrorists.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Freemasons

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Life Changers
programme.desc: We're revealing all the unforgettable dishes that changed our lives.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Southern Charm

programme.desc: The adventures of Bluey, a loveable puppy who lives with her parents and little sister.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Hissy's Big Day/ Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly try to cheer Hissy up by taking her to their favourite places. Later, A.R.F. is reprogrammed to take the pugs where they want, but not being them back.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Puggy-ology/ Squirrels Just Wanna Have Fun
programme.desc: The pugs travel to an archeology site to find artifacts for Bob's sister. Then, when a noisy squirrel keeps Bob from getting work done, the pugs must work together to get the squirrel back to its family.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: One Small Ruff for Pup-kind / The Lost Bouncy Ball
programme.desc: The pups head to Space Camp to give a dog toy to Chloe; The pups get help to find their bouncy ball.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Cheetah Chase / Training Daze
programme.desc: When a cheetah is accidentally set loose, Pip and Freddy must play a game of tag to catch it; Pip and Freddy find themselves leading a group of storks on a class trip.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Night Flight/ Slippery When Wet
programme.desc: Freddy must face his fear of the dark when he and Pip are assigned a nighttime delivery. Pip hopes to speed through the next delivery, but they are tasked to deliver a baby sloth.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Billy Beagle's Tip-Top Garage/ Diner Dog Rescue
programme.desc: Billy Beagle films the garage crew as they try to turn a junker into a winning roadster in one day. The Happy Helpers help a TV chef rescue the Hot Dog Diner.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Super-Charged: The Big Cheesy / Shenannygans!
programme.desc: During the Cooper's Hill Cheese Rolling Chase, a cheese wheel spins out of control! The Happy Helpers work as nannies for two children in London and take them on new experiences!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob and Ana's Bubble Bummer/ Seen Any Seashells?
programme.desc: The Playcare float breaks down before the People and Pets Parade! The Pugs and Keia head out on an ocean-bound mission to find the perfect seashell for Ana!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Design-a-dog/ Ice, Ice Puggy
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly accidentally chew Bob's childhood toy. Then, when Bobo's icemaker breaks, the pugs go to Antarctica to get him ice.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Looking After Gekko/ Catboy and Teeny Weeny Ninjalino
programme.desc: Night Ninja steals the school bus and converts it into his very own super-vehicle. The PJ Masks discover a super teeny Ninjalino at HQ.

programme.title: PJ Masks: May the Best Power Win/ Moonbreaker
programme.desc: Romeo creates an All-in-One belt to combat the PJ Masks' new powers.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Puzzling Pugs/ Rhapsody in Pug

programme.title: Bluey: Grannies / Yoga Ball / Calypso
programme.desc: Bingo and Bluey have a question for their Nana; Mum teaches Bingo how to use her bark; Bluey and her friends learn from their teacher, Calypso.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Prince Pete's Catnap

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy's Petting Zoo
programme.desc: Goofy along with Mickey are on the search for the Zoo animals Goofy let escape from work.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald Hatches an Egg
programme.desc: The clubhouse pals discover a mystery egg among Goofy's rock collection; they try to find out what kind of animal is inside in order to return it to its mother. In the meantime, Donald Duck serves as a reluctant babysitter when the little egg develops.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Big Band Concert
programme.desc: The Sensational Six Polka Band is planning to provide the musical accompaniment for the baby elephants' dance performance.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy's Hat
programme.desc: When Goofy loses his hat, he doesn't feel 'Goofy' anymore.

programme.desc: Mickey invents a new Motor Lab to add new upgrades to the gang's roadsters. The Happy Helpers offer their services to make Bigby Towers' windows sparkle and shine.

programme.desc: When a puppy gets lost at Adopt-A-Palooza, it's up to the pugs, Keia and their new friend to find it. Bingo, Rolly and Keia go off in search of Captain Wunderbark's long-lost ship.

programme.desc: After K.C. gets sick, Pip and Freddy watch the babies in the Nursery for her. Then, when delivery batches of bunnies get mixed up, the Junior Fliers must figure out which bunny is which.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Rock-A-Bye Birdie/ The Fly-Along
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy must impress Captain Beakman when she joins them for a ride-a-long delivery. When Mimi the mockingbird sings K.C.'s lullaby she puts everyone at T.O.T.S. to sleep.

programme.title: Bluey: The Doctor / The Claw / Markets
programme.desc: Honey has to wait for Dr. Bingo's appointment; Bluey and Bingo fail to get candy from a claw machine; Bluey wants to buy something from the market.

programme.desc: When Bob brings home a lost kitty, Bing and Rolly try find her a home. While in Florida, Bingo and Rolly search for an old friend of Bob's.

programme.desc: Bob takes the pugs on a dinner train but all the food's gone missing; When ARF's batteries run out, the pugs and pals try to rescue their robo-brother.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Great Shirt Rescue / A Pugatastic Day with Grandma
programme.desc: When Bob loses his lucky shirt before an important meeting, the pups stage a heist to get it back. The pugs are left at Bob's mother's house when he goes out of town.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Out Foxed/ Elephant in the Room
programme.desc: Freddy's status as the best hide-and-seeker is challenged after he and Pip lose to a baby fox. Pip and Freddy help K.C. earn her first Golden Feather on Cleaning Day.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Purrfect Little Helper/ The Colorful Chameleon
programme.desc: When Pip and Freddy have to deliver a kitten, they think it's a mistake since there are no cats at T.O.T.S. The Junior Fliers must deliver a baby chameleon that keeps disappearing!

programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly reunite Cupcake and Rufus after a fight; Bob forgets his camera on a trolley.

programme.title: Movie: Beverly Hills Cop
programme.desc: A wise-cracking, rule-breaking Detroit cop finds himself in Los Angeles to investigate the murder of a friend. While there, he teaches some stiff-necked Beverly Hills counterparts some lessons in the fine arts of investigation techniques.

programme.title: Movie: Coming to America
programme.desc: An African prince travels to America to avoid an arranged marriage and find a new bride.

programme.title: Movie: A Taste of Summer
programme.desc: A woman makes a risky move and opens her own restaurant, igniting her passion for cooking. Upon her arrival, she meets a former baseball player, with a competitive streak, who has opened his own new restaurant and sparks fly.

programme.title: Movie: My Favorite Wedding
programme.desc: The maid of honour is stood up by her boyfriend and befriends the groom's best man. She then has to decide to go back to her old life or pursue a new one.

programme.title: Movie: Write Before Christmas
programme.desc: A woman writes special Christmas cards to those who inspired her.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Actor
programme.desc: The girls vie for the attention of a famous TV actor when he stars in a local play.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Before and After
programme.desc: Rose is convinced she died during a throat spasm. This leads her to live her life to the hilt, totally disrupting the other girls' lives. Then, when the girls complain about her new lifestyle, Rose moves out.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: And Then There Was One
programme.desc: Sophia readies herself for participating in a walkathon. Meanwhile, Dorothy, Blanche, and Rose babysit for the walkathon participants' children. But when the event is over, a baby is left unclaimed.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Bedtime Story
programme.desc: When the girls learn that a number of relatives are going to be visiting, they reminisce about times they've had to share a bed and strange places they've had to sleep, including a train station.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Forgive Me, Father
programme.desc: Blanche and Rose plan a nice dinner at the house for Dorothy and her new boyfriend, who she later learns is a priest. She later gets another shock when she learns he plans to leave the church.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Long Day's Journey Into Marinara
programme.desc: Sophia's sister, Angela arrives in Miami for a visit and decides to move there but while she's looking for an apartment Dorothy invites her to stay with the girls. This ticks off Sophia since she thinks that Angela is after everything that she has.

programme.title: Frasier: Roe to Perdition
programme.desc: In preparation for an upcoming dinner party, Frasier and Niles search for quality caviar.

programme.title: Frasier: Some Assembly Required
programme.desc: Feeling handy for the first time in his life, Frasier helps in the construction of a home.

programme.title: Frasier: Farewell Nervosa
programme.desc: When a loud and annoying folk singer invades Café Nervosa, Niles and Frasier flee.

programme.title: Frasier: The Devil and Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Frasier visits his old friend Dr. Phil, and is shocked to discover who Phil's agent is.

programme.title: Frasier: Fathers and Sons
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles revel in the company of their mother's former research partner.

programme.title: Frasier: Analyzed Kiss
programme.desc: Reeling from her break-up with her accountant, Julia breaks into Frasier's office.

programme.title: Frasier: A New Position for Roz
programme.desc: While preparing to leave KACL for a new job, Roz is concerned about Frasier and Julia.

programme.title: Frasier: No Sex Please, We're Skittish
programme.desc: Though KACL has hired her replacement, Roz is not ready to turn in her headphones.

programme.title: Frasier: A Man, a Plan and a Gal
programme.desc: Daphne and Niles have a dinner party to make an announcement; Frasier faces his fear.

programme.title: Frasier: The Doctor Is Out
programme.desc: Frasier is mistakenly believed to be gay when a caller sees him with Niles in a bar.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Whose Face Is This, Anyway?
programme.desc: Blanche is convinced that her beauty is fading after attending her high school reunion and discovers many of her classmates have had face lifts. Meanwhile, Rose is making a home movie for class she's taking.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Dorothy's Prized Pupil
programme.desc: Dorothy feels that it's her fault when her prized pupil wins a writing contest which inadvertently signals the INS that he’s an illegal alien.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Diamond in the Rough
programme.desc: While Dorothy and Rose are planning a hospital charity banquet, Blanche falls for Jake, the caterer hired for the event. She quickly learns he's more blue jeans than a black tie which prompts her to foolishly put a stop to their romance.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Son-in-Law Dearest
programme.desc: Dorothy's daughter arrives after she learns that her husband is cheating on her.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: To Catch a Neighbor
programme.desc: Two police detectives stake out the girls' home to investigate the neighbors whom are believed to be dealers in stolen gems.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Piece of Cake
programme.desc: While preparing for a friend's birthday party, the girls recall past birthdays, including Rose's surprise birthday party for Dorothy, a surprise birthday party for Blanche and a memory of Sophia's birthday involving her late-husband Sal.

programme.title: Movie: The Perfect Catch
programme.desc: When her high school boyfriend, a superstar baseball player, returns to town, a single-parent finds the inspiration to reinvent her struggling diner and revisits the past to find something even better for the future.

programme.title: Movie: The Art of Us
programme.desc: A woman tries to land a position at Boston Art College and counts on curating a big art gallery at the university to do so. When she loses her showcase artist and has no one else, she turns to her recently-hired dog walker who is a skilled painter.

programme.title: Movie: Sailing Into Love
programme.desc: Biology teacher Claire is a bridesmaid and conducts a class on Blue Island. Claire takes action when she learns her former boyfriend works for the developer building a resort on Blue Island.

programme.title: Movie: All of My Heart: Inn Love
programme.desc: Brian and Jenny are engaged and preparing for the grand opening of their bed and breakfast, Emily's Country Inn. But when a big storm hits Bucks County, all their plans end up sopping wet.

programme.title: South Park: Coon 2: Hindsight
programme.desc: 'Coon and Friends' set out to help the victims of BP's latest catastrophic drilling accident in the Gulf. Much to the Coon's dismay, another Super Hero gets there first.

programme.title: South Park: Mysterion Rises
programme.desc: Mysterion's true identity is revealed. Meanwhile, the Coon, scorned by his fellow Super Heroes, turns to the demon god Cthulhu to help him get his revenge on friends and the rest of mankind.

programme.title: South Park: Coon vs. Coon and Friends
programme.desc: Coon and Friends find themselves at the mercy of Cartman who now has the dark lord, Cthulhu, doing his bidding. Kenny wrestles with the curse of his super power through his alter ego, Mysterion.

programme.title: South Park: The City Part of Town
programme.desc: The town of South Park is gentrifying and Kenny thinks it's time to get a job.

programme.title: South Park: Cartman Finds Love
programme.desc: Cartman finally lets a special someone knows exactly how he feels about them.

programme.title: South Park: Bass to Mouth
programme.desc: The kids' most scandalous secrets are being leaked on an outrageous new gossip website.

programme.title: South Park: Canada on Strike
programme.desc: The head of the World Canadian Bureau leads the country into a long and painful strike and the responsibility of brokering a settlement rests with the boys.

programme.title: South Park: The Ungroundable
programme.desc: Butters is sure he's seen a vampire at school but he can't get anyone to listen to him. Meanwhile, the Goth Kids are angry and frustrated when the other kids can't tell the difference between a Goth and a Vampire.

programme.title: South Park: Le Petit Tourette
programme.desc: Cartman discovers the joys of having Tourette's syndrome. Drunk with the power of saying whatever he wants without getting in trouble for it, he lines up National TV Coverage to take advantage of his new life with no filters.

programme.title: South Park: Crème Fraiche
programme.desc: Stan's life is a shambles both at home and in school. Randy's obsession with the Food Network Is changing everything. It even forces Sharon to explore a new interest of her own.

programme.desc: Sketches include Great Moments in Hookup History, Ask a Black Dude and Fat Joe.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Kneehigh Park and Making da Band

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: PopCopy and Clayton Bigsby

programme.title: The Office: Office Olympics

programme.title: The Office: Performance Review
programme.desc: On performance review day, the employees meet with Michael to discuss their work performances. The only thing on Michael's mind is his own impending review from his boss later that day.

programme.title: The Office: E-Mail Surveillance
programme.desc: The employees at Dunder Mifflin are upset when Michael starts monitoring their emails. Meanwhile, Pam suspects Dwight and Angela are having an affair. Michael later shows up uninvited at Jim's barbecue and sings karaoke.

programme.title: The Office: Boys and Girls

programme.title: Marrying Millions: Steaks with Snakes
programme.desc: After an eventful first year together, Brianna and Bill plan a big blowout in honor of Bri’s 22nd birthday. They soon come to find that some of their culture clash issues from their first year are still alive and well.

programme.title: Movie: The Neighbor in the Window
programme.desc: After a woman moves to Washington to start a new life with her husband, she realizes her new neighbour is not what she seems.

programme.title: Movie: Prosecuting Casey Anthony
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at the investigation into Caylee Anthony's death from the point of view of the prosecutor.

programme.title: Movie: Drew Peterson: Untouchable
programme.desc: A police officer, who has been married three times, lands a girl half his age. While his relationship with his new girl blossoms, he is undergoing a bitter divorce from his third wife, who unexpectedly ends up dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Wrong Foot
programme.desc: Illinois police discover a footprint on a birthday card that could lead to the home invader who killed a man and attacked two young girls.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Order Up
programme.desc: The murder of a prominent businessman in Colorado is particularly difficult to solve since the killers left virtually no forensic evidence at the scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Whodunit
programme.desc: An evening out to a murder mystery theatre turns into a real life whodunit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Horse Play
programme.desc: A young, happily married woman died tragically in a horseback riding accident. Her husband seemed far from grief-stricken and, when they investigated his background, police discovered a web of lies and a proficiency with pharmaceuticals.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sibling Rivalry
programme.desc: Two of America’s premier pornographers happen to be brothers. When one turns up dead, his brother confesses to shooting him. The question for investigators is whether the shooting was pre-meditated.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pastoral Care
programme.desc: The body of a female prison guard shows up in a landfill and investigators suspect the hundreds of prisoners in the facility where she worked.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tooth or Consequences
programme.desc: An investigation into the disappearance of a young woman uncovers a tooth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sniffing Revenge
programme.desc: Unexpected death appears to be foul play but that is refuted after autopsy is performed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All Charged Up
programme.desc: Philadelphia authorities use an anonymous letter to locate a perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Breaking the Mold
programme.desc: A family realizes that their health problems could be related to an uninvited 'guest.'

programme.title: Forensic Files: Road Rage
programme.desc: Bloody sneakers and a purse found in a sleeping bag leads police to the body of a young woman. After collecting, sorting, and analyzing all sorts of evidence, it's a simple mark on the woman's body that will solve the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hunter or Hunted?
programme.desc: A women is killed in the woods on the last day of hunting season, and police assume it was an accident until a suspicious letter arrives.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Making the Collar
programme.desc: A 16-year-old girl goes missing, and nine months later, her body is found. Forensic scientists narrow it down to a postal worker with a dog and red carpet, just with the evidence found on the girl's body.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Financial Downfall
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman is found dead after what seems like a tragic, accidental fall over a cliff. After a closer look at photographs from the scene, police get a new, more sinister theory about the young woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Treading Not So Lightly
programme.desc: When a four-year-old girl is found unconscious in a parking lot, police concluded it was a hit and run vehicle accident, and left it at that. But the girl's mother was determined to find out exactly what had happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shopping Spree
programme.desc: A mother and her daughter leave home for a day of shopping, but never return. The little girl's body was found dumped off of a roadside, but there was no sign of her mother. Forensic science determined if the baby's mother was a suspect or a victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Prayer
programme.desc: Madalyn Murray O'Hair and her two top lieutenants disappeared with no shortage of suspects. Her abduction may never have been solved if it weren't for the discovery of a headless, handless body, and the serial number on an artificial hip.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clutch of Witnesses
programme.desc: Two eyewitnesses see a truck intentionally drive over a sleeping man outside a motorcycle gang's clubhouse. During the investigation the witnesses, the truck, and the body disappear, leaving police just one clue: a bloodstain in the snow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Past Lives: The Madison Rutherford Case
programme.desc: The body of a wealthy American businessman is found in his rental car. When the victim's wife files a claim for $7 million of life insurance, investigators seek the help of a forensic anthropologist and uncover a chilling scheme of fraud and deceit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over and Out
programme.desc: A pipe bomb explodes in a house, killing a man and wounding his mother. Police use a lot number on a battery and a mailing label to track down the bomber, and determine his motive.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In Harm's Way
programme.desc: A woman's butchered body is found, and the medical examiner preserves her rib cage bearing a mortal wound and containing the identifying microscopic marks of the blade used; miles away, a knife is found that will be compared to her bone markings.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Corpus Delecti
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace, and even though foul play is suspected the trail goes cold. After twenty years a group of volunteer forensic scientists locate her body and bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death by a Salesman
programme.desc: Even though there were no witnesses, police manage to track down murderer less than 12 hours after the fact. Using fingerprints at the scene and security camera footage, officers arrested the perpetrator even though he was out of the state, on a bus.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Web of Seduction
programme.desc: When the scene of a murder proves to be completely bare of evidence, computer forensics experts manage to dig up files on the victim's computer, and those of his wife and her lover that finger a suspect.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Co-Ed Killer: The Murder Capital Of The World (Part 1)
programme.desc: A frantic public, desperate for answers, live in terror, waiting for the man they dubbed 'The Co-Ed Killer' to strike again. But no one could have expected that the person responsible, a local man, Edmund Kemper, was living among them.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Co-Ed Killer: Thinking Murder All Day Long (Part 2)
programme.desc: In April 1973, 24-year-old Edmund Kemper had murdered six coeds in and around the city of Santa Cruz, California, shaking the community to its core.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.desc: When a man's friends report his mail-order bride missing, police soon orient their investigation around the husband. While following up on some leads, they dig up some evidence tying him to deaths of two other wives.

programme.title: Forensic Files: News at 11
programme.desc: Authorities believe that the death of a news anchor is the result of a tragically overzealous fan, but when a police dog tracks the killer back to the crime scene, officers are forced to include the crowd of onlookers in their list of suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Desire
programme.desc: Investigators initially believed a house fire that killed a woman was unintentionally caused by a cigarette, but a closer look by scientists uncovers more to the story.

programme.desc: This trip, Guy's stepping into some family kitchens. In Vancouver, B.C., the Chinese joint hand-pulling noodles and using ages-old family recipes for dishes like beef rolls.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Tried and True
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits a roadside shack in Kittery serving the same fried clam recipe since 1956. He also visits a go to burger spot in Washington, D.C., and an Italian joint that has been around for 45 years.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Hometown Inspiration
programme.desc: Guy Fieri hits the road to meet chefs putting their roots into their menus. In Logan, Utah, a joint servin' Louisiana specialties like blackened chicken pasta and a marrow butter burger.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Bagels, Biscuit and Boar
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is diggin' into all kinds of flavour, starting in Santa Fe, N.M., at a pub serving comfort grub like chicken and biscuits and in-the-shell clam chowder. Also, a spot in Reno, NV, is on its game with a double elk chop and wild boar spaetzle.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Tastier at Home
programme.desc: Four chefs walk Guy virtually through one of their dishes. In this episode, there's a French dip from Seattle, San Diego arancini, Boston kabobs and bangin' shrimp all the way from North Pole, Alaska.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Mom and Dad
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's hanging out at real-deal mom-and-pop spots. In Logan, Utah, a family-run Indian joint hooked up to a gas station with Dad dishin' out specialties from his homeland.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Old Faves, New Craves
programme.desc: In Annapolis, Maryland, two Irish brothers serving up food from their homeland with a twist, like Guinness fried oysters with homemade coleslaw.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Worldwide Delivery
programme.desc: On the takeout menu today is Roman-style pizza from Arizona, a wicked-hot burger from Boston, Hawaiian surf and turf and Trinidadian specialities out of Seattle.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Meat Sampler
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's digging into all kinds of different meats on this trip. In Ottawa, Canada, a carnivore haven stackin' sandwiches with dynamite duck and a pork trifecta. In Richmond, Va., a taco joint loading up out-of-bounds oxtail.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Kansas City Barbecue Tour
programme.desc: An award-winning BBQ master serves up the Kansas City special: burnt ends.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Kid Rock's Detroit Tour
programme.desc: Guy's taking Kid Rock's lead on a tour through D-town!

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Meat Lover's Paradise
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's signing up for a meat-crazed master class. In Portland, Ore., the craft-cooking family joint with a chef who butchers, cures, preserves and smokes everything in-house.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Port to Port
programme.desc: Guy's going from Portsmouth, New Hampshire to Portland, Ore. for righteous coast-to-coast flavor. In Oregon, a Spanish spot serving outrageous octopus and an homage to the chef's childhood.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Worldwide Delivery
programme.desc: On the takeout menu today is Roman-style pizza from Arizona, a wicked-hot burger from Boston, Hawaiian surf and turf and Trinidadian specialities out of Seattle.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Homeland Favorites
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's celebrating homeland favorites from all kinds of diverse cultures. In Richfield, Minn., the Mexican restaurant-market combo dishing out real-deal tacos al pastor and carnitas tamales.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: BBQ Bites And Southern Flavor
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's grabbing some barbecue and Southern comfort.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Blue Plate Specials
programme.desc: Guy Fieri searches out some off-the-hook specials, from fried pickles and homemade corn dogs in North Carolina and Italian beef in Chicago, to Los Angeles Governator's special breakfast.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Playin' Chicken
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's playing a tasty game of chicken all over the country. In Alameda, Calif., a joint is cookin' it Nashville hot-style and putting a gourmet twist on a burger. In Lansing, Mich., the bird is served French-style at a pizza joint.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pizza Plus
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri is divin' into the pie and other major mouthfuls. In Boston, a joint putting beer into their crust and then topping it with taco fixins and a steak-and-cola combo.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Local Flavor
programme.desc: Guy visits an 85-year old Seattle joint for secret family chili, and a 100-year old California bar-turned-restaurant for crab cioppino and artichoke soup.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burgers, Steaks and Chops
programme.desc: Guy looks at burgers and steaks in San Francisco and Cambridge.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Viewer's Choice
programme.desc: Guy Fieri goes to some great places viewers have suggested: a sixty-year-old legacy in Florida where even the fish goes in the smoker, a Hawaiian paradise outside of Seattle, serving up authentic island food that has mainlanders hooked.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fully Focused
programme.desc: Guy visits restaurants in Syracuse and Nags Head that have a definite direction.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: Alright! It's Taco Night!
programme.desc: Make tacos every night with Rachael Ray's easiest fish tacos with red rice and black beans. Rachael tosses tilapia in a blend of spices, lightly fries it up and layers it with fresh Pico de Gallo. The dish is lightly spiced with hints of jalapeno.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Patio Party: A Dip for Everyone
programme.desc: Valerie hosts a summer get-together. The menu includes grilled vegetables with avocado yogurt dip and tapenade aioli dip.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Recipes Made With Love
programme.desc: The Kitchen is celebrating Mother's Day with recipes made with love! Geoffrey Zakarian updates a dish from his mom's recipe box with easy Grilled Lamb Chops and Vegetable Skewers.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Book and Wine Club
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood and her sister, Beth, get ready for their book club! First, Beth heads to a local bookstore, where she runs into bestselling author, Ann Patchett.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Farm Brunch Anniversary
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is making a special brunch for the family to celebrate her and her husband Nick's third wedding anniversary. There's shakshuka with feta, Brussel sprout and bacon hash, roasted potatoes with paprika mayo and pocket pastries for dessert.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: 16 Minute Meals: Italian
programme.desc: Ree Drummond makes a trio of marvelous 16-minute Italian meals. There's speedy pork scaloppini for a fast family dinner and snappy, saucy steak pizzaiola that the boys absolutely adore.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Double Care Package
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is making care packages for her two daughters in college. She sends them homemade breakfast tarts, nut and seed brittle, salt and pepper crackers and cherry gummies for something sweet.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Summer Produce Relay
programme.desc: The Kitchen passes the summer produce and cooking easy, flavourful recipes. Katie Lee shares a grilled smoky tofu tacos with peach cucumber salad. She tosses a cucumber to Sunny, who makes easy mustard-pickled vegetables.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Feeding Hungry Boys
programme.desc: Trisha's nephew and his two college friends are visiting for the weekend. While the boys are having fun on the lake, Trisha whips up a protein packed meal of sausage and peppers.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Tex-Mex Entertaining
programme.desc: Ina Garten has all the bases covered when it comes to Tex-Mex entertaining. She makes a light and airy tres leches cake with berries and make ahead whipped cream, and her crowd-pleasing pork Posole.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Spice Games
programme.desc: Four chefs who like their food with some heat fight for the title of Spice Master by making a spicy high-end dinner with ingredients for bread pudding, playing Spree Ball to determine their dish's pepper and creating a spicy guilty pleasure.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Express Lane Extreme
programme.desc: Guy Fieri puts the chefs to the test with games of extreme limitations. First, the chefs make their best chicken dish using only eight ingredients. Then, Guy asks for a regional comfort dish with a seven-ingredient limit.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Comfort Food Cook-Off
programme.desc: Guy Fieri brings four comfort food experts to Flavortown to compete in games that will push them out of their comfort zone. First, the chefs must make their signature dish while incorporating a list of mandatory ingredients.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Funny Food
programme.desc: Standup comics team up with Food Network all-star mentors in hilarious grocery games to earn money for charity. First, the comedians must make a late night dinner using only the ingredients they can fit in a very small shopping bag.

programme.desc: Sick of Granny Jojo's ugly gifts, Nicole encourages the kids to take matters into their own hands and accidentally break her latest hideous vase. When Gumball, Darwin and Anais try to destroy it, they discover it is more robust than it seems.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Stink

programme.desc: A desire to find the hidden images in a puzzle finds Beast Boy learning to use more than ten percent of his brain.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Beast Girl

programme.desc: The prize jewel on the Secret Joyful Burger menu is a mysterious burger, but to order it you need to know its name. When Larry refuses to tell them what it’s called, they go to super-sized lengths to discover it.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Boredom

programme.title: The King of Queens: Fair Game

programme.title: The King of Queens: Surprise Artie

programme.title: The Goldbergs: The Pina Colada Episode

programme.title: The Goldbergs: I Coulda Been a Lawyer
programme.desc: Beverly decides their street needs another stop sign and pleads her case to the city comptroller. Barry panics when he realizes he's neglected his college applications, but the situation only gets worse once Murray is involved.

programme.title: Roseanne: Life and Stuff
programme.desc: After Darlene begins barking in class, Roseanne is called to the school for a parent/teacher conference.

programme.title: Roseanne: We're in the Money

programme.title: Roseanne: D-I-V-O-R-C-E

programme.title: Roseanne: Language Lessons
programme.desc: Dan and Roseanne agree to take a body language test which exposes Dan's true feelings about Jackie.

programme.title: Roseanne: Radio Days
programme.desc: Roseanne encourages Dan's decision to enter a country-western song writing contest. Meanwhile, the friction between Booker and Jackie heats up.

programme.title: Roseanne: Lover's Lane
programme.desc: Roseanne gets a glimpse at Becky's first boyfriend. Meanwhile, Booker makes a bet with Jackie. If she loses, she'll have to spend the night with him.

programme.title: Roseanne: The Memory Game
programme.desc: Dan is enthusiastic to take photographs for his and Roseanne's upcoming fifteen-year high school reunion. Roseanne learns of a secret Dan has kept from her for years.

programme.desc: Jeremy Wade sets out to discover the true river monster of South America.

programme.title: River Monsters: Mongolian Mauler
programme.desc: In Mongolia, Jeremy hopes to reel in a rare river monster that's become legendary.

programme.title: River Monsters: Bone Crusher
programme.desc: Jeremy is on the trail of a new river monster after a corpse is found with highly unusual injuries. He also uncovers a spate of disappearances and a mysterious creature patrolling the water.

programme.title: River Monsters: Deadliest Man-Eaters: Aquatic Killers of North America

programme.title: River Monsters: Malaysian Lake Monster
programme.desc: After two men vanish from a remote lake in Malaysia, Jeremy Wade sets out to track down the possible culprit. A trail of evidence leads Jeremy into an ancient rainforest, where an old adversary lies in wait.

programme.title: River Monsters: South Pacific Terrors
programme.desc: In Fiji, people are coming under attack from unseen assailants in the water, but it's not clear if there are multiple culprits or a single persistent perpetrator. Jeremy Wade battles tropical storms and thick jungle in an all-out search for a culprit.

programme.title: River Monsters: Deadliest Man-Eaters: Australian Aquatic Terror
programme.desc: In Australia, a chainsaw-like predator and freshwater shark terrorizes its rivers. Jeremy Wade must battle treacherous conditions and encounters a real-life 'Crocodile Dundee' in order to solve a two-decade mystery.

programme.title: River Monsters: Freshwater Shark
programme.desc: Investigating the deadly bullshark, which isn't limited to the world's oceans.

programme.title: River Monsters: Malaysian Lake Monster
programme.desc: After two men vanish from a remote lake in Malaysia, Jeremy Wade sets out to track down the possible culprit. A trail of evidence leads Jeremy into an ancient rainforest, where an old adversary lies in wait.

programme.title: Furever Home Family: Lexington, KY

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Pressure Cooker
programme.desc: Villalobos faces one of their most challenging rescues when a house fire reveals a massive dog-hoarding situation. Two teachers fall in love with a deaf puppy they hope to give a forever home.

programme.desc: Martha Stewart shows how to make a backyard fence similar to her own dog run and dog breeder Ari Katz weighs in. Hailey Bieber gave her dog a trim and needs Martha's advice on how to fix it. Designer Zac Posen asks what vegetables he can give to his dog.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: From Craftsman to Creole Cottage

programme.title: What on Earth?: Did We Find Flight 370?
programme.desc: Investigators find a new clue about the missing Malaysia Airlines flight that disappeared in 2014. An astronaut spots something strange in the Sahara Desert. A mysterious orange sludge invades a remote village in Alaska.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of the Lost Kingdom
programme.desc: Stories on this episode include the face of Christ is found in a field in Hungary, a photo that claims to show who shot down a passenger jet in Ukraine and a sinister shape in the mountains of Afghanistan that leads investigators to a hidden genocide.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Finding Sodom
programme.desc: Mike Barratt, an astronaut with NASA, explains the strange rings on the world's oldest lake that were photographed from the International Space Station. Since then, more rings have been seen and they continue to baffle scientists.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Raiders of the Holy Lance
programme.desc: A heavily armored force takes over one of Syria's most ancient archaeology sites, prompting fears that its relics are being stolen. Tanks appear to be facing off in Antarctica next to an unworldly object. A water reservoir in LA suddenly turns black.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Terror of the Ice Snake
programme.desc: Satellites discover a mysterious trail of sinister black objects in the snow and ice of Antarctica, and when experts discover that it's moving, they use cutting-edge tech to investigate who or what is behind this strange phenomenon.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien Armageddon Conspiracy
programme.desc: A terrifying tower of fire is caught on camera, causing eyewitnesses to fear an alien invasion. Using cutting-edge science, experts investigate the threat causing this nightmarish phenomenon, and if a cover-up is hiding the truth.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: When Bigfoot Attacks
programme.desc: When cameras record a strange creature in the wilderness perform an incredible feat of strength, some suspect it's hard proof of Bigfoot; using cutting-edge science, experts investigate if they've discovered the spawn of Sasquatch and Iron Man.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Escobar's Ghost
programme.desc: Moments before Pablo Escobar's abandoned luxury building is demolished, cameras capture footage of a ghostly figure in the window, and some believe it was the notorious drug lord himself; experts investigate who this phantom was and what happened to them.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Zombie Graveyard
programme.desc: Cameras capture something shocking in a cemetery: empty graves, as if the dead walked out in the middle of the night; using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate what's behind this apparent evidence of zombie activity.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Ghosts of the Jungle
programme.desc: Investigations into strange occurrences caught on camera.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien of the Amazon
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a strange, blob-like alien in the Amazon jungle, some experts suspect that the origins of this monster are stranger-than-fiction; using cutting-edge science, investigators try to explain this bizarre beast.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Skinwalker Awakens
programme.desc: Evidence of a man transforming into an animal is caught on camera on a Native American reservation in Utah, leading some experts ask if it's proof of a Skinwalker, a legendary evil creature that can shapeshift into a deadly beast.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Aliens of Hell Highway
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a highway swarmed with snake-like creatures and an unexplained ooze, experts investigate the origins of these alien creatures; the latest tech reveals where they came from and their top-secret purpose.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Into the Wild
programme.desc: While out for a run in the Montana wilderness, 22-year-old college student Kari Swensen is taken prisoner by two mountain men. When she learns of their twisted plans for her, she'll do everything she can to escape or die trying.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Blood in the Barn
programme.desc: Small-town gal Frankie Cochran thinks she's found the one in handsome David Gehrard. But as his behavior brings rising cause for concern, Frankie wonders if a secret from his past might hold more meaning than she first thought.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Locked Away
programme.desc: After a college graduate goes missing from her parents' home, investigators must rely on quick thinking and cunning police work, as they race against the clock to find her before it's too late.

programme.title: 48 Hours on ID: NCIS: A Date with Evil
programme.desc: After a young military wife goes missing the investigation takes NCIS agents into the dark world of master and slave role-playing.

programme.title: 48 Hours: NCIS: Deadly Lies
programme.desc: The search for a marine who missed roll call launches NCIS agents into a world of calls, texts, a relationship built on lies, and an ill-fated case of mistaken identity.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Taken Away
programme.desc: Jessie Bardwell seemingly vanished from the Texas home she shared with her boyfriend, Jason Lowe. Fearing the worst, her father traveled to Texas to start the search for his daughter. Her body was later found on a farm wrapped in a sheet.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Murder on Red River
programme.desc: More than 15 years after a Texas woman was found dead, floating in a river, a former Marine and a filmmaker think they can find her killer. See if they can solve a cold case that has haunted her Texas town since Mother's Day, 2007.

programme.title: 48 Hours: NCIS: Deadly Lies
programme.desc: The search for a marine who missed roll call launches NCIS agents into a world of calls, texts, a relationship built on lies, and an ill-fated case of mistaken identity.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Operation Murder
programme.desc: Hear the final chapter in the investigation into the alleged murder-for-hire plot launched by two Houston doctors, and their relationship with a former U.S. army soldier who pretended to take a hit job.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Karrie's Choice
programme.desc: '48 Hours' tackles the question of whether one parent in a bitter custody battle could sway a teenager so strongly that they would help commit the murder of the other parent.

programme.title: 48 Hours on ID: NCIS: A Date with Evil
programme.desc: After a young military wife goes missing the investigation takes NCIS agents into the dark world of master and slave role-playing.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: The Sinner and The Saint
programme.desc: When the sleepy town of Mooresburg, TN receives news that beloved teacher Margaret Jack Sliger is murdered on her farm, Hawkins County detectives are charged with finding the sinister perpetrator to bring their community justice.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: He'd Do It Again
programme.desc: When the well-liked South Bend native, Tim Moore, seemingly vanishes one cold November night, residents begin to realize they may not know the folks next door as well as they thought.

programme.title: Disappeared: American Gothic
programme.desc: When a bible teaching mom goes missing from her family's farm, Missouri investigators must decipher a cryptic handwritten note. They wonder if Lynn Messer was a troubled soul or the victim of foul play. A walk in the woods uncovers a mysterious skull.

programme.title: Disappeared: The Silent Son
programme.desc: When 17-year-old Macin Smith doesn't come home from school, his parents worry is he in danger. A note hidden in his wallet leaves his family troubled. Police attempt to piece together the puzzle, while his family vacillates between hope and despair.

programme.title: Disappeared: Born This Way
programme.desc: When Sage Smith, a transgender teen in Charlottesville, Virginia goes missing, police identify a suspect. But the investigation turns up evidence that forces detectives to look closer into Sage's inner circle to see if there are answers.

programme.title: Dark Waters: Murder in the Deep: Hijacked
programme.desc: Kelley Branam's husband Jake is a Miami charter boat captain with high aspirations. Jake works long hours to support his new family but Kelley's suspicions run deep. Out of the blue, she decides to join Jake on a charter and is never heard from again.

programme.title: Dark Waters: Murder in the Deep: Screams of the South Pacific
programme.desc: Serena Karlan leaves everything she knows behind to join her boyfriend, retired NBA champion Bison Dele, aboard his catamaran in the South Pacific. Serena is the happiest she's ever been, until Dele's estranged brother surfaces and throws them off course.

programme.title: Dark Waters: Murder in the Deep: Lady of the Lake
programme.desc: Florence and Mark Unger love nothing more than vacationing at the lake with their two boys. Life is perfect, until an old sports injury pulls Mark into the depths of painkiller addiction. To keep her family afloat, Florence does whatever is necessary.

programme.title: Dark Waters: Murder in the Deep: Last Breath
programme.desc: Living near Lake Minnetonka, MN with his wife and daughter, Jeff Skelton thinks his life is perfect until rumors of infidelity surface. Everyone has their breaking point. Jeff will do whatever it takes to keep his family from being pulled apart.

programme.title: Southern Gothic: They Call Me Animal
programme.desc: After three teens vanish, a Texas town's worst fears are realized when they're found dead. Details of a related robbery identify a suspect, but after a rattling jailbreak, the city must mobilize the largest manhunt in state history to nab the culprit.

programme.title: Southern Gothic: Bloodshed in the Bayou
programme.desc: After a mother is brutally slain in her home, police collect bizarre evidence they hope will lead to a murderer. When a second body turns up, this Louisiana community fears a serial killer is on the loose.

programme.title: Southern Gothic: The Sinner
programme.desc: When a young husband is shot dead in his Morris, Alabama home, police initially believe it's a robbery gone awry. But once the town rumor mill swirls to life, authorities uncover a dark secret hiding between the pews of the local Baptist church.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: She Never Saw It Coming
programme.desc: A young Iranian mom and wife lands the perfect job with a Portland insurance agency. But her charm and intellect make her the focus for several male co-workers. Corporate intrigue turns to cold-blooded murder when she's found dead, shot in the head.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Vlad's Impalers
programme.desc: Vlad the Impaler, the inspiration for the fictional character of Dracula, was one of the most ruthless and brutal rulers in medieval Europe.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Alexander The Great's Spidermen
programme.desc: Alexander the Great confronts a rebel warlord in an impregnable mountain stronghold. He despatches 300 hand-picked warriors to scale the sheer rock face at night without being detected. It's a brutal test of climbing skill and raw courage.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Pretend to Be a Cop
programme.desc: Peter Gibbs is a career criminal who is constantly lured to the dark side after every prison release, despite vowing to go straight. After a string of robberies catches up to him, he faces decades behind bars but refuses to go down without a fight.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Steal a Rich Woman's Jewelry
programme.desc: An elderly woman puts up a fight when an ex-employee tries to steal her rings, and is murdered.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Burn a Truck
programme.desc: Jermaine LeBron and his friends murdered a man in Florida and stole his expensive truck.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Get Home to Mother
programme.desc: After getting handed a stiff sentence for robbery, Robert Nielsen flees the brutality of prison by escaping and living under the radar with his family in California. But even they can't shield the young fugitive from the challenges of being on the run.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got To Get Bike Parts
programme.desc: In central Florida in 1991, Marvin Carson settled an argument with rival gang member Richard Hawk by shooting him repeatedly with an AK47. Carson then went on the run. But when he returned to his home town, police were tipped.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Burn a Truck
programme.desc: Jermaine LeBron and his friends murdered a man in Florida and stole his expensive truck.
