programme.title: Warrior POV: Tet Offensive
programme.desc: During the infamous Tet Offensive of 1968, an elite band of US Special Operations troops are called in to rescue dozens of helpless civilians trapped in the border town of Chau Doc, which has been captured by an overwhelming Viet Cong invasion force.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Search and Destroy
programme.desc: In a battle known as the Nine Days in May, the troops of the US 4th Infantry Division are on a search and destroy mission in Vietnam's Central Highlands when they run headlong into a massive force of North Vietnamese soldiers on the Cambodian border.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Road to Baghdad
programme.desc: See the shot by shot firefights in the 21 day bloody battle for Baghdad from the warrior's point of view.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Battles
programme.desc: With incredible archive from the heart of the action, and interviews with world-leading historians, this action-packed episode counts down the most decisive battles of warfare that have been caught on camera.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Commanders
programme.desc: This is the story of warfare in the modern age, from the legendary Spitfire to the stealth bombers of the second Iraq conflict.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Inventions
programme.desc: From the mass production of life-saving Penicillin and pioneering Plastic Surgery, to the development of the Internet and GPS, this episode uses rare archive footage and expert interviews to identify and rank the most influential inventions of warfare.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Weapons
programme.desc: The story of warfare in the modern age, from the legendary Spitfire to the stealth bombers of Iraq.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Fallujah
programme.desc: Fallujah, Iraq's most volatile city, has become a haven for radical Muslim fighters from around the world. To root them out, the U.S. military unleashes Operation Phantom Fury. Soldiers and Marines engage the enemy in brutal urban combat.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Screaming Eagles in Afghanistan
programme.desc: In 2010, the 'Screaming Eagles' of the 101st Airborne Division face off against the Taliban during Operation Dragon Strike. The American soldiers of the 101st head up Afghanistan's 'Highway to Hell' to take back the countryside from a deadly enemy.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: In 1941, Hitler has thrown himself into a fight to the death against Stalin. Two decades earlier, in 1917, Joseph Jughashvili from Georgia is a member of Lenin's Bolshevik Party, who has just seized power in Russia. The country is torn by civil war.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Natural Fit for a Fun Family
programme.desc: After moving to their forever home, a young family from College Grove, TN, is ready to build their dream pool. The Pool Kings accept the challenge, creating a tropical paradise with a massive waterfall, a swim-up bar and an oversized outdoor kitchen.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Everything But the Trellis
programme.desc: After moving into a lovely Santa Barbara home, that once belonged to a master gardener, this family with little interest in gardening decides to get help. Mike and Jim turn a garden path into a swimming lane, and the flowerbed into a stylish pool house.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Champagne Spa Wishes and Forever-home Dreams
programme.desc: Grandparents Joe and Beth want to add a dream pool to their forever home so they can host more family events. They hope the addition of this backyard oasis will complete their dream home and allow them to create many more memories outside.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Cabanas and Cannonballs
programme.desc: A couple who recently moved into a new house in Austin, Texas, has decided it's finally time to build the family pool of their kids' dreams.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Perfect Time for a Pool and Backyard Oasis
programme.desc: A Houston, Texas, family is ready to make their dream pool a reality, so the Pool Kings accept the challenge to take this family's outdoor fun to the next level with a dynamic, resort-style pool.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Cliffside Dreams
programme.desc: A couple with a crew of rambunctious kids and a dream house in San Antonio is in desperate need of a pool. The kings design an expansive pool with a Baja shelf, swim-up bar, giant infinity edge and massive two-storey deck to enjoy the view.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Hill Country Heaven
programme.desc: After years of clearing and construction, Rene and Kelly are finally ready to put in a pool that completes their beautiful, 20-acre San Antonio property. Tony and Paul include a huge natural waterfall, stacked-stone spa and Baja shelf.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Modern Mountain Pool
programme.desc: A family enhances their spectacular mountain view with a breathtaking oversized pool featuring an infinity edge. An outdoor kitchen and firepit complete the space.

programme.title: Pool Kings: From Overgrown to Over the Top
programme.desc: A Franklin, Tennessee, family has been living with an unfinished pool for over two years and is in desperate need of a pool rescue. The Pool Kings step in to transform this backyard from a state of chaos to something beyond their wildest dreams.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Making a Splash in Arizona
programme.desc: Jeromey and Jay of Premier Pools create a personal resort for Arizona newcomers: Sally and Samer.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Top of the Mountain
programme.desc: Lucas heads west to Bountiful, UT to build a dream backyard on the side of a mountain. Faced with many challenges, Lucas creates a Tuscan themed pool complete with a spa, the biggest linear fire wall he's ever built and a grotto with a 23,000 pound lid.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: In Hot Water
programme.desc: After ten years of saving and dreaming for a pool, a couple wants Lucas to build the wow factor. The crew creates a giant double-pool feature with a connecting stream and several customized surprises to deliver the 'wow' and dismiss any doubt.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Growing Pains
programme.desc: A couple hires Lucas to take their outdated pool and remodel so it's safe for their baby boy. The hope is that the dull patio pool will be transformed into a stunning natural atrium.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Paradise on the Bay
programme.desc: A couple from Snead Island, Florida asks the Lucas Lagoons crew to create a bayside paradise. This outdoor living space, pool, spa, fire feature and kitchen will be built without any of Lucas' signature rock work.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Fiesta de Laguna
programme.desc: It's fiesta time as pool designer Lucas Congdon and his crew are challenged to create a Mexican resort in a Venice, Florida residential backyard. Lucas encounters several design 'firsts' on his journey to infuse the flavors of Mexico into his creation.

programme.title: Cupcake Championship: Life With Molly Yeh
programme.desc: Gender reveal cupcakes are all the rage, so Food Network host and new mom Molly Yeh challenges four top cupcake designers to create their best revealing design.

programme.title: Cupcake Championship: From Science Fiction to Just Plain Science
programme.desc: In the first round, four cupcake makers take a mystical journey by combining two mythical beings into a new creature. Judges decide whose mythical mashup cupcakes advance them to the championship round.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Wilmington, North Carolina
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country culinary adventures take him to the port city of Wilmington, North Carolina, for a barbecue bonanza, a totally bonkers burrito and a big, bad behemoth in the undefeated Pierogi Team Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Charlotte, North Carolina
programme.desc: Casey Webb charges into Charlotte, North Carolina, for three takes on Southern specialties. There's a cheesy chicken classic care of Korea, a time-honored institution's signature sandwich and the biggest walking taco in all the Carolinas.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Sacramento, California
programme.desc: Casey Webb swings into Sacramento, California, for three gold-standard meals from the Golden State, including a perfectly fried Chinese-American chicken, a savory multi-meat waffle stack.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Antonio, TX
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to San Antonio, Texas. His first stop is San Antonio's oldest restaurant- a German deli- for the Wienerschnitzel.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Omaha, Nebraska
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Omaha to satisfy his hunger in the heartland. He chows down on a historic Reuben sandwich, a soul food feast featuring fried chicken from a 100-year-old recipe.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Green Bay
programme.desc: Adam is at the NFL's opening game in Green Bay to showcase the city's best eats.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Columbus, Ohio
programme.desc: Casey Webb's countrywide edible expedition brings him to Columbus, Ohio. His massive meals include a bacon-wrapped hot dog with a crazy combination of toppings and a footlong chicken burrito blanketed in ghost pepper sauce.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Tucson
programme.desc: Adam goes to Tucson for a hot dog wrapped in bacon and covered in all the fixins.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Santa Fe, New Mexico
programme.desc: Casey Webb's search for the biggest and best in Santa Fe, New Mexico, starts with a sopapilla stuffed with carne asada. Then he takes on some game-changing ice cream flavored with the local delicacy, green chiles.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Miami, Florida
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country food frenzy brings him to Miami, Florida, where he first tackles a triple-layer burger. Next, he delights in some innovative, Cuban-inspired ice cream flavored with cream cheese, guava and cookies.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Sacramento, California
programme.desc: Casey Webb swings into Sacramento, California, for three gold-standard meals from the Golden State, including a perfectly fried Chinese-American chicken, a savory multi-meat waffle stack.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Omaha, Nebraska
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Omaha to satisfy his hunger in the heartland. He chows down on a historic Reuben sandwich, a soul food feast featuring fried chicken from a 100-year-old recipe.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Green Bay
programme.desc: Adam is at the NFL's opening game in Green Bay to showcase the city's best eats.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Columbus, Ohio
programme.desc: Casey Webb's countrywide edible expedition brings him to Columbus, Ohio. His massive meals include a bacon-wrapped hot dog with a crazy combination of toppings and a footlong chicken burrito blanketed in ghost pepper sauce.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Tucson
programme.desc: Adam goes to Tucson for a hot dog wrapped in bacon and covered in all the fixins.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Santa Fe, New Mexico
programme.desc: Casey Webb's search for the biggest and best in Santa Fe, New Mexico, starts with a sopapilla stuffed with carne asada. Then he takes on some game-changing ice cream flavored with the local delicacy, green chiles.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Miami, Florida
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country food frenzy brings him to Miami, Florida, where he first tackles a triple-layer burger. Next, he delights in some innovative, Cuban-inspired ice cream flavored with cream cheese, guava and cookies.

programme.desc: Phoebe freaks out when she thinks her concert tickets were destroyed in the paper shredder, but really Max has stolen them so he can take his crush to the show.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Phoebs Will Rock You
programme.desc: Phoebe tries to turn herself into a bad girl to appeal to Max's new best friend, a bad boy rocker who is the key member of Max's new band.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: Octo-Charlotte/ Trouble in Tropikini
programme.desc: Schwoz accidentally morphs Charlotte into half girl/ half octopus, Captain Man and Kid Danger work to change her back but first they must catch her. The group's vacation is cut short when Jasper falls into a volcano and is held captive by the Volcaniacs.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: Texas Weiners/ YooHooTube
programme.desc: Captain Man and Kid Danger are tasked with driving to pick up 1,000 hot dogs for a birthday party. To save Schwoz from an experiment gone wrong, Captain Man and Kid Danger must follow instructions he posted online.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Skunked/ Axin' Saxon
programme.desc: Cricket stages a crisis by letting skunks into the café, but it gets out of control. Nancy accidentally destroys Saxon, but Tilly mistakenly directs her wrath at Gramma.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Place/ Volunteer Tilly
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of a boy whose curiosity and enthusiasm lead him on journeys.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Park Pandemonium/ Cricket's Biscuits
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of a boy whose curiosity and enthusiasm lead him on journeys.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cane Crazy / Flood, Sweat & Tears
programme.desc: When Anne breaks Hop Pop's favorite cane, she and her friends set out to replace it; After Anne's bedroom floods she has to share a room with Sprig.

programme.title: The Owl House: I Was a Teenage Abomination
programme.desc: Luz sneaks into the local magic school to help a friend and makes a new enemy in the process.

programme.title: DuckTales: Who Is Gizmoduck?!
programme.desc: When Fenton accidentally uses the Gizmoduck armor to save Huey from a bank robbery, Mark Beaks convinces him to leave McDuck Industries to become a crowd-funded superhero.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: The Beast from the Yeast
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Hardlight
programme.desc: Now fugitives, Big Hero 6 lay low as the SFPD searches for them. However, new villain Hardlight shows up hoping to challenge Big Hero 6 to a real-life videogame duel.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Hiro The Villain
programme.desc: Momakase blackmails Hiro into helping her steal her family's knives from Yama's safe.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Portal Enemy
programme.desc: Megan confronts Hiro about being a vigilante and threatens to tell Chief Cruz the truth.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Fred the Fugitive
programme.desc: Fred's invisibility function on his suit glitches during patrol.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Major Blast
programme.desc: Fred is targeted when a new villain, Major Blast appears in the city.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The Present
programme.desc: When Hiro finds a wrapped present in the closet, he assumes it's from Aunt Cass and takes it in order to figure out what it is. However, after a mix-up, the present becomes lost and Hiro enlists the Big Hero 6 team to track it down.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Fear Not
programme.desc: Supersonic Stu busts his grandmother, Supersonic Sue, out of prison.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Internabout
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Legacies
programme.desc: Chief Cruz and the police get the upper hand in their battle with both villains and Big Hero 6 when they begin using Buddy Guardians, powerful new robots produced by Krei Tech.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Baymax Dreams
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Shorts: Natures Wonderland/ Shipped Out/ The Birthday Song
programme.desc: Mickey Mouse finds himself in silly situations around the world.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Shorts: Outback at Ya!/ A Pete Scorned/Two Can't Play
programme.desc: Mickey Mouse finds himself in silly situations around the world.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Shorts: The Fancy Gentleman/ Springtime/ Roll' Em
programme.desc: Mickey Mouse finds himself in silly situations around the world.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: An Alarming Situation
programme.desc: A team of young practical jokers pull off hilarious pranks in this hidden camera series.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Big Mother is Watching
programme.desc: The kids are outraged to learn that a tracking app has been installed on all of their phones.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: A Very Vlad Joke
programme.desc: The team tries to teach Bailey's new friend Vlad the art of pulling off a great practical joke, just in time for them to pull off an epic prank involving a teacher's aide, aliens and the military.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Party at Gordy's
programme.desc: Chance tries to figure out why he's the only one of his friends invited to a classmate's party, while the gang pulls off a prank that makes Herman's creepy life-size doll appear to come to life just in time to scare a babysitter.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Dino Safari VR
programme.desc: Chance, Herman and Dusty are mesmerized by a new dinosaur virtual reality game which inspires a new set of pranks. Bailey disguises as a mind-melting robot from the future. An unsuspecting camp counselor believe he's discovered a spaceship in the woods.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Stuck
programme.desc: When Herman tries to do a prank on his own, he ends up trapped inside the school's trophy case. Now it's up to the rest of the gang to get him out without getting caught.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: So You Think You Can Middle School Dance
programme.desc: It's Herman's first school dance and the gang tries to teach him the ropes, but Herman ends up teaching them instead. Meanwhile, Uncle Will's mom is famous for her gigantic turkeys. Will invites a guest over a feast he won't soon forget.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: The Battle for Mewni
programme.desc: Star returns to her home dimension of Mewni where she discovers that magic is disappearing throughout the kingdom, so she must dig deep and challenge her arch nemesis Ludo in an effort to save her family and kingdom.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Dragon vs. Apocalypse!
Yo-Kai Watch: Komasan: Movin' on Up!/ Yo-kai Baku/ Kyubi: Operation Amusement Park
programme.desc: A boy named Nate find a capsule which give him a Yo-Kai watch for identifying Yo-Kai.

programme.title: Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: Lillier and the Staff!
DuckTales: Friendship Hates Magic!
programme.desc: Stuck as a shadow, Lena tries to protect Webby from her suspicious new friend Violet during a supernatural sleepover.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Nega-Globby
programme.desc: Honey Lemon sets out to cure Globby and make him human again. However, Big Hero 6 must now face a new different evil glob-like villain.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper vs. Manliness
programme.desc: In a quest to attain manliness, Dipper ventures into the forest to battle the notorious Multi-Bear. Mabel tries to teach Grunkle Stan how to be attractive to women, particularly the waitress in the local diner, Lazy Susan.

programme.title: The Owl House: Something Ventured, Someone Framed
programme.desc: When Gus sneaks Luz into Hexside School to present at the Human Appreciation Society, Luz sees a side of the school she didn't expect.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Urban Legend/ Wishing Well
programme.desc: When Bill learns that Gramma has been purposely creating a frightening reputation around town, he throws a barbeque to befriend the neighbors. Cricket makes a wishing well to cash in on people making wishes.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne or Beast?/ Best Fronds
programme.desc: Sprig tries to capture a mysterious beast to prove that he's responsible; Sprig takes Anne swimming in a nearby lake to help her feel less homesick.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Domino Effect / Taking Charge
programme.desc: Anne wants to keep a caterpillar as a pet, but she'll have to keep it a secret from Hop Pop; After one of the Plantars mysteriously runs out the charge on Anne's phone, the family embarks on a mission to try and recharge it.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lily Pad Thai/ Plantar's Last Stand
programme.desc: Anne gets a job at Stumpy’s and goes overboard turning the diner into a Thai restaurant. After a rent increase on the food stand, Anne convinces Hop Pop to sell Plantar's Potions.

programme.title: Amphibia: Dating Season / Anne vs. Wild
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: Snow Day/ Cracking Mrs. Croaker
programme.desc: When a winter cold snap freezes all the frogs in Wartwood, Anne must protect the townspeople. In an effort to make Mrs. Croaker like him, Sprig digs up a secret from her past.

programme.title: Amphibia: Croak and Punishment/ Trip to the Archives
programme.desc: When Sprig's Blue Moon Shell is stolen, he and Anne investigate to find the crook. To prepare for Anne's quest, the Plantars go to the archives and accidentally get trapped!

programme.title: Amphibia: Toad Tax/ Prison Break
programme.desc: Anne befriends toad soldiers to gain respect in Wartwood, but must choose between her new respect and her frog family. Far from Wartwood, Anne’s friend Sasha is captured by toads.

programme.title: Amphibia: Family Fishing Trip/ Bizarre Bazaar
programme.desc: Sprig wants to spend time with Hop Pop on their family fishing trip, but Hop Pop's friend Sylvia gets in the way. Anne's music box goes missing at the mysterious and exclusive Bizarre Bazaar.

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year
programme.desc: A scary mushroom adventure! Anne wins the prestigious “Frog of the Year” award and gets to plan her own party, but the frogs of Wartwood may not be ready for a human-style bash.

programme.title: Amphibia: Reunion
programme.desc: During a banquet hosted by the toads, Anne is reunited with a friend from home.

programme.title: Movie: Loving
programme.desc: After building their dream home, Richard and Mildred Loving are forced to go out of state to get married, as interracial marriages are illegal in their town. After returning, they are arrested, and start a civil rights case that would change history.

programme.title: Movie: A Monster Calls
programme.desc: A young boy tries to deal with his mother's terminal illness and constant attacks by the local bully. One night, he meets a giant monster, a humanoid tree, which comes to him and tells stories. The Monster teaches him about dealing with loss and anger.

programme.title: Movie: Walk the Line

programme.title: Movie: Pineapple Express
programme.desc: Stoner Dale Denton visits his dealer to get some rare weed called Pineapple Express. He witnesses a murder by a crooked cop and a drug lord, drops his weed and goes on the run. He finds out the weed can be traced due to its rarity and runs for his life.

programme.desc: Former military expert interrogator questions a woman being accused of cheating on her high school sweetheart after he finds condoms and another man’s underwear in their home.

programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross: Medieval Malpractice/ It's Raining, It's Pouring
programme.desc: A fallen knight at a medieval jousting show sues for medical expenses; A plumber blames an electrician for property damage.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Lovett vs. Hilton
programme.desc: A woman is convinced her boyfriend fathered their fifth child and not the man she slept with while they were 'on a break'.

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett: Tattooed Teen/ Snap Out of It
programme.desc: Mother sues ex-husband over daughter's tattoo; woman sues over damaging online video.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Sexxxy Strippers
programme.desc: Alex is a stripper and doesn’t want anyone trying to satisfy her client. While Alex was on maternity leave, she claims her customer Raymond accepted dances from her colleague Peyton.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: A woman is suing her ex-boyfriend for credit card bills and claims he was physically abusive numerous times, held a gun to her head and she had to file a restraining order against him.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'Being Too Difficult' and 'A Terrible Tow.'

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'Lawyering Up', 'Kanye'ing A Customer ' and ' Keeping The Cash.'

programme.desc: A DJ sues a client who refuses to pay him; a comedian claims fellow performer defamed him.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: A woman says her ex-boyfriend wrecked her car; the ex-boyfriend says he made the payments for the car and owes nothing. Former friends are in court over cameras and equipment expenses. Parties dispute a car collision.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Prove You're Not a Bad Mom
programme.desc: Amanda’s' family believes that she has abused her children and that she cause her oldest son to have Shaken Baby Syndrome. She has not seen any of her children after they were taken from her custody 6 months ago.

programme.title: Maury
programme.desc: Maury Povich explores compelling issues that impact society as a whole, and digs deep to get to the heart of the matter.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: I'll Have Sex With My Sister's Husband...Again
programme.desc: Justin has been stressed out by married life. He and his wife Jessica have been married for 2 months and have 7 kids between them.

programme.title: Maury: DNA Will Prove I Just Gave Birth to Your Husband's Baby!
programme.desc: Stephanie wants to prove to her husband Juwan and his mom that he fathered her daughter. Then, Tyler was shocked to learn the man who got pregnant was married, but now he's denying her baby. Gary says he's not Brandon's father as he's missing a birthmark.

programme.title: LHN Stories: XX

programme.title: LHN Stories: XII

programme.title: Mike & Molly: The Good Wife
programme.desc: Molly's leisure activities between novels become an issue with Mike as he wants her to be the perfect homemaker.

programme.desc: The "Meet Outdoor Man" contest winner, Wayne, believes Mike's vlogs contain secret messages. Vanessa wants to make friends, and starts a lending library in her neighbourhood. Chuck adjusts to his new life now that his wife has taken a job in L.A.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Take Me to Church
programme.desc: Mike and Vanessa become increasingly worried that their daughters don't attend church anymore, so they decide to take it upon themselves to make church more interesting for everyone involved.

programme.title: Black-ish: Elephant in the Room

programme.title: Black-ish: Good in the 'Hood
programme.desc: Dre's sister Rhonda takes Jack and Diane to her part of town in a black neighbourhood and claims the twins are scared of their own community. Dre and Rhonda take them to a local diner to show them why it's so special.

programme.title: Masters of Illusion: The Sound of Magic and the Intrusive Rope

programme.title: Being Reuben: A Very Modern Family

programme.title: Being Reuben: Four Go Camping

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Junk Mail

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Nap

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Who Is This Vod Kanockers?

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Oontz. Oontz. Oontz

programme.title: The Goldbergs: I Caddyshacked the Pool

programme.title: Mom: Diabetic Lesbians and a Blushing Bride
